```
2055dc1 (HEAD -&gt; main, origin/main, origin/HEAD) Checkpoint: Mobile web UX improvements: taller tab bar (72px) with larger icons (28px) and elevated shadow, FAB repositioned above tab bar (bottom: 96), control buttons enlarged to 52×52px, marker card raised to bottom: 104 with improved shadow, stats strip repositioned, sightings tab bar with taller tap targets (paddingVertical: 14) and active highlight, larger header and sort button, bigger sighting cards (minHeight: 96). 0 TypeScript errors.
b197d10 Checkpoint: Complete feature pass: offline cache + delta sync, proximity alerts (2km radius), swipe-to-vote gestures, multi-plate ALPR picker, shareable links (Web Share API + clipboard fallback), CSV/JSON export for plate history, embeddable map widget (/widget route), anomaly detection endpoint, plate search bar, recent plates list, widget shortcut button on map. All 14 tests pass, 0 TypeScript errors.
d75fd55 Checkpoint: Major enhancement release: dark CartoDB map tiles, custom SVG markers with agency colors and pulse animations, marker clustering, AI vehicle/agency/badge identification, convoy detection algorithm, trending plates screen with 24h rankings, distance labels on sighting cards, confirmed-by-multiple badge, watch/notify for plates, camera screen with license plate targeting overlay and GPS pre-warm, full dark theme across all screens, and Leaflet global initialization fix.
be99701 Checkpoint: Implemented real-time updates with 10-second polling, user-centered map view, and live notification badges showing new sightings as they appear. Map now loads all 500 most recent sightings and centers on user's location.
223b4d8 Checkpoint: Added automatic license plate recognition using AI vision and real-time plate tracking. Users can now auto-extract plates from photos and view complete movement history for any vehicle.
f5668bf Checkpoint: Converted Vehicle Tracker to web application with browser-based camera, geolocation, and Leaflet maps. All features work in browser without native dependencies.
55468e2 Checkpoint: Vehicle Tracker mobile app with photo capture, GPS tracking, real-time map, community verification system, and anonymous voting. All core features implemented and tested.
53366af Initial project bootstrap
```

```
import { ThemedView } from "@/components/themed-view";
import * as Api from "@/lib/_core/api";
import * as Auth from "@/lib/_core/auth";
import * as Linking from "expo-linking";
import { useLocalSearchParams, useRouter } from "expo-router";
import { useEffect, useState } from "react";
import { ActivityIndicator, Text } from "react-native";
import { SafeAreaView } from "react-native-safe-area-context";

export default function OAuthCallback() {
  const router = useRouter();
  const params = useLocalSearchParams&lt;{
    code?: string;
    state?: string;
    error?: string;
    sessionToken?: string;
    user?: string;
  }&gt;();
  const [status, setStatus] = useState&lt;"processing" | "success" | "error"&gt;("processing");
  const [errorMessage, setErrorMessage] = useState&lt;string | null&gt;(null);

  useEffect(() =&gt; {
    const handleCallback = async () =&gt; {
      console.log("[OAuth] Callback handler triggered");
      console.log("[OAuth] Params received:", {
        code: params.code,
        state: params.state,
        error: params.error,
        sessionToken: params.sessionToken ? "present" : "missing",
        user: params.user ? "present" : "missing",
      });
      try {
        // Check for sessionToken in params first (web OAuth callback from server redirect)
        if (params.sessionToken) {
          console.log("[OAuth] Session token found in params (web callback)");
          await Auth.setSessionToken(params.sessionToken);

          // Decode and store user info if available
          if (params.user) {
            try {
              // Use atob for base64 decoding (works in both web and React Native)
              const userJson =
                typeof atob !== "undefined"
                  ? atob(params.user)
                  : Buffer.from(params.user, "base64").toString("utf-8");
              const userData = JSON.parse(userJson);
              const userInfo: Auth.User = {
                id: userData.id,
                openId: userData.openId,
                name: userData.name,
                email: userData.email,
                loginMethod: userData.loginMethod,
                lastSignedIn: new Date(userData.lastSignedIn || Date.now()),
              };
              await Auth.setUserInfo(userInfo);
              console.log("[OAuth] User info stored:", userInfo);
            } catch (err) {
              console.error("[OAuth] Failed to parse user data:", err);
            }
          }

          setStatus("success");
          console.log("[OAuth] Web authentication successful, redirecting to home...");
          setTimeout(() =&gt; {
            router.replace("/(tabs)");
          }, 1000);
          return;
        }

        // Get URL from params or Linking
        let url: string | null = null;

        // Try to get from local search params first (works with expo-router)
        if (params.code || params.state || params.error) {
          console.log("[OAuth] Found params in route params");
          // Extract from params
          const urlParams = new URLSearchParams();
          if (params.code) urlParams.set("code", params.code);
          if (params.state) urlParams.set("state", params.state);
          if (params.error) urlParams.set("error", params.error);
          url = &#96;?${urlParams.toString()}&#96;;
          console.log("[OAuth] Constructed URL from params:", url);
        } else {
          console.log("[OAuth] No params found, checking Linking.getInitialURL()...");
          // Fallback: try to get from Linking
          const initialUrl = await Linking.getInitialURL();
          console.log("[OAuth] Linking.getInitialURL():", initialUrl);
          if (initialUrl) {
            url = initialUrl;
          }
        }

        // Check for error
        const error =
          params.error || (url ? new URL(url, "http://dummy").searchParams.get("error") : null);
        if (error) {
          console.error("[OAuth] Error parameter found:", error);
          setStatus("error");
          setErrorMessage(error || "OAuth error occurred");
          return;
        }

        // Check for code and state
        let code: string | null = null;
        let state: string | null = null;
        let sessionToken: string | null = null;

        // Try to get from params first
        if (params.code &amp;&amp; params.state) {
          console.log("[OAuth] Using code and state from route params");
          code = params.code;
          state = params.state;
        } else if (url) {
          console.log("[OAuth] Parsing code and state from URL:", url);
          // Parse from URL
          try {
            const urlObj = new URL(url);
            code = urlObj.searchParams.get("code");
            state = urlObj.searchParams.get("state");
            sessionToken = urlObj.searchParams.get("sessionToken");
            console.log("[OAuth] Extracted from URL:", {
              code: code?.substring(0, 20) + "...",
              state: state?.substring(0, 20) + "...",
              sessionToken: sessionToken ? "present" : "missing",
            });
          } catch (e) {
            console.log("[OAuth] Failed to parse as full URL, trying regex:", e);
            // Try parsing as relative URL with query params
            const match = url.match(/[?&amp;](code|state|sessionToken)=([^&amp;]+)/g);
            if (match) {
              match.forEach((param) =&gt; {
                const [key, value] = param.substring(1).split("=");
                if (key === "code") code = decodeURIComponent(value);
                if (key === "state") state = decodeURIComponent(value);
                if (key === "sessionToken") sessionToken = decodeURIComponent(value);
              });
              console.log("[OAuth] Extracted from regex:", {
                code: code?.substring(0, 20) + "...",
                state: state?.substring(0, 20) + "...",
                sessionToken: sessionToken ? "present" : "missing",
              });
            }
          }
        }

        console.log("[OAuth] Final extracted values:", {
          hasCode: !!code,
          hasState: !!state,
          hasSessionToken: !!sessionToken,
        });

        // If we have sessionToken directly from URL, use it
        if (sessionToken) {
          console.log("[OAuth] Session token found in URL, storing...");
          await Auth.setSessionToken(sessionToken);
          console.log("[OAuth] Session token stored successfully");
          // User info is already in the OAuth callback response
          // No need to fetch from API
          setStatus("success");
          console.log("[OAuth] Redirecting to home...");
          setTimeout(() =&gt; {
            router.replace("/(tabs)");
          }, 1000);
          return;
        }

        // Otherwise, exchange code for session token
        if (!code || !state) {
          console.error("[OAuth] Missing code or state parameter", {
            hasCode: !!code,
            hasState: !!state,
          });
          setStatus("error");
          setErrorMessage("Missing code or state parameter");
          return;
        }

        // Exchange code for session token
        console.log("[OAuth] Exchanging code for session token...", {
          code: code.substring(0, 20) + "...",
          state: state.substring(0, 20) + "...",
        });
        const result = await Api.exchangeOAuthCode(code, state);
        console.log("[OAuth] Exchange result:", {
          hasSessionToken: !!result.sessionToken,
          hasUser: !!result.user,
        });

        if (result.sessionToken) {
          console.log("[OAuth] Session token received, storing...");
          // Store session token
          await Auth.setSessionToken(result.sessionToken);
          console.log("[OAuth] Session token stored successfully");

          // Store user info if available
          if (result.user) {
            console.log("[OAuth] User data received:", result.user);
            const userInfo: Auth.User = {
              id: result.user.id,
              openId: result.user.openId,
              name: result.user.name,
              email: result.user.email,
              loginMethod: result.user.loginMethod,
              lastSignedIn: new Date(result.user.lastSignedIn || Date.now()),
            };
            await Auth.setUserInfo(userInfo);
            console.log("[OAuth] User info stored:", userInfo);
          } else {
            console.log("[OAuth] No user data in result");
          }

          setStatus("success");
          console.log("[OAuth] Authentication successful, redirecting to home...");

          // Redirect to home after a short delay
          setTimeout(() =&gt; {
            console.log("[OAuth] Executing redirect...");
            router.replace("/(tabs)");
          }, 1000);
        } else {
          console.error("[OAuth] No session token in result:", result);
          setStatus("error");
          setErrorMessage("No session token received");
        }
      } catch (error) {
        console.error("[OAuth] Callback error:", error);
        setStatus("error");
        setErrorMessage(
          error instanceof Error ? error.message : "Failed to complete authentication",
        );
      }
    };

    handleCallback();
  }, [params.code, params.state, params.error, params.sessionToken, params.user, router]);

  return (
    &lt;SafeAreaView className="flex-1" edges={["top", "bottom", "left", "right"]}&gt;
      &lt;ThemedView className="flex-1 items-center justify-center gap-4 p-5"&gt;
        {status === "processing" &amp;&amp; (
          &lt;&gt;
            &lt;ActivityIndicator size="large" /&gt;
            &lt;Text className="mt-4 text-base leading-6 text-center text-foreground"&gt;
              Completing authentication...
            &lt;/Text&gt;
          &lt;/&gt;
        )}
        {status === "success" &amp;&amp; (
          &lt;&gt;
            &lt;Text className="text-base leading-6 text-center text-foreground"&gt;
              Authentication successful!
            &lt;/Text&gt;
            &lt;Text className="text-base leading-6 text-center text-foreground"&gt;
              Redirecting...
            &lt;/Text&gt;
          &lt;/&gt;
        )}
        {status === "error" &amp;&amp; (
          &lt;&gt;
            &lt;Text className="mb-2 text-xl font-bold leading-7 text-error"&gt;
              Authentication failed
            &lt;/Text&gt;
            &lt;Text className="text-base leading-6 text-center text-foreground"&gt;
              {errorMessage}
            &lt;/Text&gt;
          &lt;/&gt;
        )}
      &lt;/ThemedView&gt;
    &lt;/SafeAreaView&gt;
  );
}

```
</details>
</tool-use>

```
import "@/global.css";
import { QueryClient, QueryClientProvider } from "@tanstack/react-query";
import { Stack } from "expo-router";
import { StatusBar } from "expo-status-bar";
import { useCallback, useEffect, useMemo, useState } from "react";
import { GestureHandlerRootView } from "react-native-gesture-handler";
import "react-native-reanimated";
import { Platform } from "react-native";
import "@/lib/_core/nativewind-pressable";
import { ThemeProvider } from "@/lib/theme-provider";
import {
  SafeAreaFrameContext,
  SafeAreaInsetsContext,
  SafeAreaProvider,
  initialWindowMetrics,
} from "react-native-safe-area-context";
import type { EdgeInsets, Metrics, Rect } from "react-native-safe-area-context";

import { trpc, createTRPCClient } from "@/lib/trpc";
import { initManusRuntime, subscribeSafeAreaInsets } from "@/lib/_core/manus-runtime";

const DEFAULT_WEB_INSETS: EdgeInsets = { top: 0, right: 0, bottom: 0, left: 0 };
const DEFAULT_WEB_FRAME: Rect = { x: 0, y: 0, width: 0, height: 0 };

export const unstable_settings = {
  anchor: "(tabs)",
};

export default function RootLayout() {
  const initialInsets = initialWindowMetrics?.insets ?? DEFAULT_WEB_INSETS;
  const initialFrame = initialWindowMetrics?.frame ?? DEFAULT_WEB_FRAME;

  const [insets, setInsets] = useState&lt;EdgeInsets&gt;(initialInsets);
  const [frame, setFrame] = useState&lt;Rect&gt;(initialFrame);

  // Initialize Manus runtime for cookie injection from parent container
  useEffect(() =&gt; {
    initManusRuntime();
  }, []);

  const handleSafeAreaUpdate = useCallback((metrics: Metrics) =&gt; {
    setInsets(metrics.insets);
    setFrame(metrics.frame);
  }, []);

  useEffect(() =&gt; {
    if (Platform.OS !== "web") return;
    const unsubscribe = subscribeSafeAreaInsets(handleSafeAreaUpdate);
    return () =&gt; unsubscribe();
  }, [handleSafeAreaUpdate]);

  // Create clients once and reuse them
  const [queryClient] = useState(
    () =&gt;
      new QueryClient({
        defaultOptions: {
          queries: {
            // Disable automatic refetching on window focus for mobile
            refetchOnWindowFocus: false,
            // Retry failed requests once
            retry: 1,
          },
        },
      }),
  );
  const [trpcClient] = useState(() =&gt; createTRPCClient());

  // Ensure minimum 8px padding for top and bottom on mobile
  const providerInitialMetrics = useMemo(() =&gt; {
    const metrics = initialWindowMetrics ?? { insets: initialInsets, frame: initialFrame };
    return {
      ...metrics,
      insets: {
        ...metrics.insets,
        top: Math.max(metrics.insets.top, 16),
        bottom: Math.max(metrics.insets.bottom, 12),
      },
    };
  }, [initialInsets, initialFrame]);

  const content = (
    &lt;GestureHandlerRootView style={{ flex: 1 }}&gt;
      &lt;trpc.Provider client={trpcClient} queryClient={queryClient}&gt;
        &lt;QueryClientProvider client={queryClient}&gt;
          {/* Default to hiding native headers so raw route segments don't appear (e.g. "(tabs)", "products/[id]"). */}
          {/* If a screen needs the native header, explicitly enable it and set a human title via Stack.Screen options. */}
          {/* in order for ios apps tab switching to work properly, use presentation: "fullScreenModal" for login page, whenever you decide to use presentation: "modal*/}
          &lt;Stack screenOptions={{ headerShown: false }}&gt;
            &lt;Stack.Screen name="(tabs)" /&gt;
            &lt;Stack.Screen name="oauth/callback" /&gt;
          &lt;/Stack&gt;
          &lt;StatusBar style="auto" /&gt;
        &lt;/QueryClientProvider&gt;
      &lt;/trpc.Provider&gt;
    &lt;/GestureHandlerRootView&gt;
  );

  const shouldOverrideSafeArea = Platform.OS === "web";

  if (shouldOverrideSafeArea) {
    return (
      &lt;ThemeProvider&gt;
        &lt;SafeAreaProvider initialMetrics={providerInitialMetrics}&gt;
          &lt;SafeAreaFrameContext.Provider value={frame}&gt;
            &lt;SafeAreaInsetsContext.Provider value={insets}&gt;
              {content}
            &lt;/SafeAreaInsetsContext.Provider&gt;
          &lt;/SafeAreaFrameContext.Provider&gt;
        &lt;/SafeAreaProvider&gt;
      &lt;/ThemeProvider&gt;
    );
  }

  return (
    &lt;ThemeProvider&gt;
      &lt;SafeAreaProvider initialMetrics={providerInitialMetrics}&gt;{content}&lt;/SafeAreaProvider&gt;
    &lt;/ThemeProvider&gt;
  );
}

```
</details>
</tool-use>

```
import { useState, useEffect } from "react";
import {
  View,
  Text,
  TextInput,
  ScrollView,
  Pressable,
  Image,
  ActivityIndicator,
  Alert,
  Platform,
} from "react-native";
import { router, useLocalSearchParams } from "expo-router";
// Location API handled by browser Geolocation API
import * as Haptics from "expo-haptics";
import { ScreenContainer } from "@/components/screen-container";
import { IconSymbol } from "@/components/ui/icon-symbol";
import { useColors } from "@/hooks/use-colors";
import { trpc } from "@/lib/trpc";
import { getDeviceId } from "@/lib/device-id";

const VEHICLE_TYPES = ["Sedan", "SUV", "Truck", "Van", "Motorcycle", "Other"];

export default function SubmitScreen() {
  const colors = useColors();
  const params = useLocalSearchParams();

  const [licensePlate, setLicensePlate] = useState("");
  const [vehicleType, setVehicleType] = useState("SUV");
  const [notes, setNotes] = useState("");
  const [locationAddress, setLocationAddress] = useState("Loading address...");
  const [isSubmitting, setIsSubmitting] = useState(false);
  const [isExtractingPlate, setIsExtractingPlate] = useState(false);
  const [plateConfidence, setPlateConfidence] = useState&lt;number | null&gt;(null);
  const [detectedPlates, setDetectedPlates] = useState&lt;string[]&gt;([]);
  const [showPlatePicker, setShowPlatePicker] = useState(false);

  const extractPlateMutation = trpc.alpr.extractPlate.useMutation();

  const photoUri = params.photoUri as string;
  const photoBase64 = params.photoBase64 as string;
  const latitude = parseFloat(params.latitude as string);
  const longitude = parseFloat(params.longitude as string);
  const locationAccuracy = parseFloat(params.locationAccuracy as string) || 0;

  const createSightingMutation = trpc.sightings.create.useMutation();

  useEffect(() =&gt; {
    // Use Nominatim for reverse geocoding
    (async () =&gt; {
      try {
        const response = await fetch(
          &#96;https://nominatim.openstreetmap.org/reverse?format=json&amp;lat=${latitude}&amp;lon=${longitude}&#96;
        );
        const data = await response.json();
        if (data.display_name) {
          setLocationAddress(data.display_name);
        } else {
          setLocationAddress(&#96;${latitude.toFixed(6)}, ${longitude.toFixed(6)}&#96;);
        }
      } catch (error) {
        console.warn("Failed to reverse geocode:", error);
        setLocationAddress(&#96;${latitude.toFixed(6)}, ${longitude.toFixed(6)}&#96;);
      }
    })();
  }, [latitude, longitude]);

  // Auto-extract license plate on mount
  useEffect(() =&gt; {
    if (!photoUri) return;

    (async () =&gt; {
      setIsExtractingPlate(true);
      try {
        // First upload the photo to get a public URL
        const deviceId = await getDeviceId();
        const photoBuffer = Buffer.from(photoBase64, "base64");
        const timestamp = Date.now();
        const fileName = &#96;temp/${deviceId}-${timestamp}.jpg&#96;;
        
        // We need to use the storagePut function, but it's server-side only
        // Instead, we'll pass the base64 data URL
        const dataUrl = &#96;data:image/jpeg;base64,${photoBase64}&#96;;
        
        const result = await extractPlateMutation.mutateAsync({
          imageUrl: dataUrl,
        });

        if (result.plate) {
          setLicensePlate(result.plate);
          setPlateConfidence(result.confidence);
          // Collect all detected plates for multi-plate picker
          const allPlates: string[] = [];
          if (result.plate) allPlates.push(result.plate);
          if ((result as any).allPlates &amp;&amp; Array.isArray((result as any).allPlates)) {
            for (const p of (result as any).allPlates) {
              if (p &amp;&amp; !allPlates.includes(p)) allPlates.push(p);
            }
          }
          if (allPlates.length &gt; 1) {
            setDetectedPlates(allPlates);
            setShowPlatePicker(true);
          }
        }
      } catch (error) {
        console.warn("Failed to extract plate:", error);
      } finally {
        setIsExtractingPlate(false);
      }
    })();
  }, [photoUri]);

  const handleSubmit = async () =&gt; {
    if (!licensePlate.trim()) {
      Alert.alert("Required Field", "Please enter a license plate number.");
      return;
    }

    if (Platform.OS !== "web") {
      Haptics.impactAsync(Haptics.ImpactFeedbackStyle.Medium);
    }

    setIsSubmitting(true);

    try {
      const deviceId = await getDeviceId();

      await createSightingMutation.mutateAsync({
        licensePlate: licensePlate.trim().toUpperCase(),
        vehicleType,
        photoBase64,
        latitude,
        longitude,
        locationAccuracy,
        locationAddress,
        notes: notes.trim() || undefined,
        photoMetadata: params.exifData as string,
        deviceId,
      });

      if (Platform.OS !== "web") {
        Haptics.notificationAsync(Haptics.NotificationFeedbackType.Success);
      }

      Alert.alert(
        "Success!",
        "Vehicle sighting has been submitted to the network.",
        [
          {
            text: "OK",
            onPress: () =&gt; {
              router.replace("/");
            },
          },
        ]
      );
    } catch (error) {
      console.error("Submit error:", error);
      Alert.alert(
        "Submission Failed",
        "Failed to submit sighting. Please check your connection and try again."
      );
    } finally {
      setIsSubmitting(false);
    }
  };

  const handleCancel = () =&gt; {
    if (Platform.OS !== "web") {
      Haptics.impactAsync(Haptics.ImpactFeedbackStyle.Light);
    }
    router.back();
  };

  return (
    &lt;ScreenContainer&gt;
      &lt;ScrollView className="flex-1" contentContainerStyle={{ paddingBottom: 32 }}&gt;
        {/* Header */}
        &lt;View className="flex-row items-center justify-between p-4 border-b border-border"&gt;
          &lt;Pressable
            onPress={handleCancel}
            style={(state) =&gt; ({ opacity: state.pressed ? 0.6 : 1 })}
          &gt;
            &lt;IconSymbol name="chevron.left" size={28} color={colors.foreground} /&gt;
          &lt;/Pressable&gt;
          &lt;Text className="text-xl font-bold text-foreground"&gt;Submit Sighting&lt;/Text&gt;
          &lt;View style={{ width: 28 }} /&gt;
        &lt;/View&gt;

        &lt;View className="p-4 gap-6"&gt;
          {/* Photo Preview */}
          &lt;View className="items-center"&gt;
            &lt;Image
              source={{ uri: photoUri }}
              style={{
                width: "100%",
                height: 240,
                borderRadius: 12,
                backgroundColor: colors.surface,
              }}
              resizeMode="cover"
            /&gt;
          &lt;/View&gt;

          {/* License Plate Input */}
          &lt;View className="gap-2"&gt;
            &lt;View className="flex-row items-center justify-between"&gt;
              &lt;Text className="text-sm font-semibold text-foreground"&gt;
                License Plate &lt;Text className="text-error"&gt;*&lt;/Text&gt;
              &lt;/Text&gt;
              {isExtractingPlate &amp;&amp; (
                &lt;View className="flex-row items-center gap-2"&gt;
                  &lt;ActivityIndicator size="small" color={colors.primary} /&gt;
                  &lt;Text className="text-xs text-muted"&gt;Detecting plate...&lt;/Text&gt;
                &lt;/View&gt;
              )}
              {plateConfidence !== null &amp;&amp; plateConfidence &gt; 0 &amp;&amp; (
                &lt;Text className="text-xs text-success"&gt;
                  ✓ Auto-detected ({Math.round(plateConfidence * 100)}%)
                &lt;/Text&gt;
              )}
            &lt;/View&gt;
            &lt;TextInput
              value={licensePlate}
              onChangeText={(text) =&gt; {
                setLicensePlate(text);
                setPlateConfidence(null); // Clear confidence when manually edited
              }}
              placeholder="Enter plate number"
              placeholderTextColor={colors.muted}
              autoCapitalize="characters"
              autoCorrect={false}
              returnKeyType="done"
              className="bg-surface border border-border rounded-lg px-4 py-3 text-foreground text-lg font-mono"
              style={{ color: colors.foreground }}
            /&gt;
            {plateConfidence !== null &amp;&amp; plateConfidence &gt; 0 &amp;&amp; (
              &lt;Text className="text-xs text-muted"&gt;
                AI detected this plate. You can edit if incorrect.
              &lt;/Text&gt;
            )}
            {/* Multi-plate picker — shown when AI detects more than one plate */}
            {showPlatePicker &amp;&amp; detectedPlates.length &gt; 1 &amp;&amp; (
              &lt;View style={{ backgroundColor: "rgba(59,130,246,0.1)", borderRadius: 8, padding: 10, borderWidth: 1, borderColor: "rgba(59,130,246,0.3)" }}&gt;
                &lt;Text style={{ color: "#3B82F6", fontSize: 12, fontWeight: "700", marginBottom: 6 }}&gt;
                  🔍 Multiple plates detected — tap to select:
                &lt;/Text&gt;
                &lt;View style={{ flexDirection: "row", flexWrap: "wrap", gap: 6 }}&gt;
                  {detectedPlates.map((plate) =&gt; (
                    &lt;Pressable
                      key={plate}
                      onPress={() =&gt; {
                        setLicensePlate(plate);
                        setShowPlatePicker(false);
                      }}
                      style={({ pressed }) =&gt; ({
                        paddingHorizontal: 12,
                        paddingVertical: 6,
                        borderRadius: 6,
                        backgroundColor: licensePlate === plate ? "#3B82F6" : "rgba(59,130,246,0.2)",
                        opacity: pressed ? 0.7 : 1,
                      })}
                    &gt;
                      &lt;Text style={{ color: licensePlate === plate ? "#fff" : "#3B82F6", fontFamily: "monospace", fontWeight: "700", fontSize: 14 }}&gt;
                        {plate}
                      &lt;/Text&gt;
                    &lt;/Pressable&gt;
                  ))}
                &lt;/View&gt;
              &lt;/View&gt;
            )}
          &lt;/View&gt;

          {/* Vehicle Type Picker */}
          &lt;View className="gap-2"&gt;
            &lt;Text className="text-sm font-semibold text-foreground"&gt;Vehicle Type&lt;/Text&gt;
            &lt;View className="flex-row flex-wrap gap-2"&gt;
              {VEHICLE_TYPES.map((type) =&gt; (
                &lt;Pressable
                  key={type}
                  onPress={() =&gt; {
                    setVehicleType(type);
                    if (Platform.OS !== "web") {
                      Haptics.impactAsync(Haptics.ImpactFeedbackStyle.Light);
                    }
                  }}
                  style={(state) =&gt; ({
                    paddingHorizontal: 16,
                    paddingVertical: 8,
                    borderRadius: 20,
                    backgroundColor:
                      vehicleType === type ? colors.primary : colors.surface,
                    borderWidth: 1,
                    borderColor: vehicleType === type ? colors.primary : colors.border,
                    opacity: state.pressed ? 0.7 : 1,
                  })}
                &gt;
                  &lt;Text
                    style={{
                      color: vehicleType === type ? "white" : colors.foreground,
                      fontWeight: vehicleType === type ? "600" : "400",
                    }}
                  &gt;
                    {type}
                  &lt;/Text&gt;
                &lt;/Pressable&gt;
              ))}
            &lt;/View&gt;
          &lt;/View&gt;

          {/* Location Info */}
          &lt;View className="gap-2"&gt;
            &lt;Text className="text-sm font-semibold text-foreground"&gt;Location&lt;/Text&gt;
            &lt;View className="bg-surface border border-border rounded-lg p-4 gap-2"&gt;
              &lt;Text className="text-foreground"&gt;{locationAddress}&lt;/Text&gt;
              &lt;Text className="text-xs text-muted"&gt;
                {latitude.toFixed(6)}, {longitude.toFixed(6)}
              &lt;/Text&gt;
              {locationAccuracy &gt; 0 &amp;&amp; (
                &lt;Text className="text-xs text-muted"&gt;
                  Accuracy: ±{locationAccuracy.toFixed(0)}m
                &lt;/Text&gt;
              )}
            &lt;/View&gt;
          &lt;/View&gt;

          {/* Notes Input */}
          &lt;View className="gap-2"&gt;
            &lt;Text className="text-sm font-semibold text-foreground"&gt;
              Notes (Optional)
            &lt;/Text&gt;
            &lt;TextInput
              value={notes}
              onChangeText={setNotes}
              placeholder="Add any additional details..."
              placeholderTextColor={colors.muted}
              multiline
              numberOfLines={4}
              textAlignVertical="top"
              returnKeyType="done"
              className="bg-surface border border-border rounded-lg px-4 py-3 text-foreground"
              style={{ color: colors.foreground, minHeight: 100 }}
            /&gt;
          &lt;/View&gt;

          {/* Submit Button */}
          &lt;Pressable
            onPress={handleSubmit}
            disabled={isSubmitting}
            style={(state) =&gt; ({
              backgroundColor: colors.primary,
              paddingVertical: 16,
              borderRadius: 12,
              alignItems: "center",
              opacity: state.pressed || isSubmitting ? 0.7 : 1,
            })}
          &gt;
            {isSubmitting ? (
              &lt;ActivityIndicator color="white" /&gt;
            ) : (
              &lt;Text className="text-white text-lg font-semibold"&gt;Submit to Network&lt;/Text&gt;
            )}
          &lt;/Pressable&gt;
        &lt;/View&gt;
      &lt;/ScrollView&gt;
    &lt;/ScreenContainer&gt;
  );
}

```
</details>
</tool-use>

orkspaceUris\\\":[],\\\"conversationState\\\":{\\\"rootPromptMessagesJson\\\":[],\\\"turnsOld\\\":[],\\\"todos\\\":[],\\\"pendingToolCalls\\\":[],\\\"turns\\\":[],\\\"previousWorkspaceUris\\\":[],\\\"fileStates\\\":{},\\\"summaryArchives\\\":[],\\\"turnTimings\\\":[],\\\"fileStatesV2\\\":{},\\\"subagentStates\\\":{},\\\"selfSummaryCount\\\":0,\\\"readPaths\\\":[]},\\\"text\\\":\\\"- **[critical] Wrong Convex function-kind wiring is masked by unsafe casts**\\\\n  - **Paths:** &#96;src/lib/convex-refs.ts&#96;, &#96;app/submit/page.tsx&#96;\\\\n  - **Why:** &#96;makeFunctionReference(name) as unknown as FunctionReference&lt;...&gt;&#96; removes kind/arg safety. &#96;ai:analyzeVehicle&#96; is an **action** but is called via &#96;useMutation(mutationRef(...))&#96;. This is a migration regression risk: wrong hook usage can fail at runtime while TS still passes.\\\\n  - **Fix:** Replace string refs + casts with generated &#96;api&#96; refs (&#96;convex/_generated/api&#96;) and call with correct hook (&#96;useAction(api.ai.analyzeVehicle)&#96;), keeping mutations on &#96;useMutation&#96;.\\\\n\\\\n- **[critical] Invalid coordinates can be persisted and poison geo queries**\\\\n  - **Paths:** &#96;convex/sightings.ts&#96;, &#96;convex/_utils.ts&#96;\\\\n  - **Why:** &#96;create&#96; parses lat/lon but does not validate finite/range values before &#96;toGeoBucket&#96;. Bad inputs can produce invalid geo buckets (e.g. &#96;\\\\\\\"NaN:NaN\\\\\\\"&#96;), then break distance math in nearby/convoy/anomaly logic.\\\\n  - **Fix:** In &#96;create&#96;, reject non-finite/out-of-range lat/lon (&#96;[-90..90]&#96;, &#96;[-180..180]&#96;) before insert; return explicit validation errors.\\\\n\\\\n- **[medium] Route param to number is unchecked (&#96;NaN&#96; path)**\\\\n  - **Paths:** &#96;app/sighting/[id]/page.tsx&#96;\\\\n  - **Why:** &#96;const sightingId = Number(params.id)&#96; can be &#96;NaN&#96;, then passed into Convex query/mutation args expecting numbers.\\\\n  - **Fix:** Validate with &#96;Number.isInteger(sightingId)&#96; and short-circuit to not-found UI before calling hooks.\\\\n\\\\n- **[medium] Live queries churn because &#96;Date.now()&#96; is used as render-time query arg**\\\\n  - **Paths:** &#96;app/sightings/page.tsx&#96;\\\\n  - **Why:** &#96;nowMs&#96; is recomputed every render and passed to &#96;trending:plates&#96; and &#96;convoy:detect&#96;, forcing unnecessary resubscriptions and inconsistent cache behavior.\\\\n  - **Fix:** Use stable time state (&#96;useState(() =&gt; Date.now())&#96;) refreshed on interval/user action, or move time-window filtering server-side without client-provided current time per render.\\\\n\\\\n- **[medium] Upload pipeline bypasses type safety for storage IDs**\\\\n  - **Paths:** &#96;app/submit/page.tsx&#96;\\\\n  - **Why:** &#96;storageId as never&#96; and &#96;imageStorageId: ... as never&#96; suppress runtime/type mismatches rather than preventing them.\\\\n  - **Fix:** Type the upload response as Convex &#96;Id&lt;\\\\\\\"_storage\\\\\\\"&gt;&#96; and validate shape before calling &#96;registerUpload&#96;/&#96;createSighting&#96;; remove &#96;as never&#96;.\\\\n\\\\n- **[medium] RAG agent plate-scoring heuristic is effectively broken**\\\\n  - **Paths:** &#96;convex/agents.ts&#96;, &#96;app/plate/[licensePlate]/page.tsx&#96;\\\\n  - **Why:** &#96;plateToken = normalizePlate(args.query)&#96; is run on full natural-language query (&#96;\\\\\\\"${plate}: ${agentQuery}\\\\\\\"&#96;), producing a merged token that almost never matches chunk content, so &#96;plateBonus&#96; rarely/never applies.\\\\n  - **Fix:** Pass &#96;plate&#96; as a separate arg to &#96;runRagAgent&#96; (or extract first plate-like token via regex) and compare that normalized plate only.\\\\n\\\\n- **[medium] AI “image analysis” currently sends only text, not image input**\\\\n  - **Paths:** &#96;convex/ai.ts&#96;\\\\n  - **Why:** &#96;chatCompletion&#96; sends a text prompt containing image URL; no multimodal payload is provided. This often yields hallucinated extraction rather than true vision analysis.\\\\n  - **Fix:** Use a vision-capable request format (&#96;image_url&#96; / &#96;input_image&#96; content parts) and schema-validate returned JSON fields.\\\\n\\\\n- **[medium] Query patterns will degrade quickly with growth (migration maintainability risk)**\\\\n  - **Paths:** &#96;convex/sightings.ts&#96;, &#96;convex/votes.ts&#96;, &#96;convex/proximity.ts&#96;\\\\n  - **Why:** Several handlers do table-wide/large collects then in-memory filtering (&#96;sightings:list&#96;, vote lookup by filtering collected votes, watch lookup by filtering device rows), despite indexes existing.\\\\n  - **Fix:** Use index-native lookups (&#96;by_hidden_createdAt&#96;, &#96;by_device_sighting&#96;, &#96;by_device_plate&#96;) and cursor-style pagination instead of &#96;collect()+filter&#96;.\\\\n\\\\n- **[low] Camera → submit handoff can fail on large captures**\\\\n  - **Paths:** &#96;app/camera/page.tsx&#96;, &#96;app/submit/page.tsx&#96;\\\\n  - **Why:** Full JPEG data URL is stored in &#96;sessionStorage&#96; without quota/error handling; high-res captures can throw and break flow before navigation.\\\\n  - **Fix:** Wrap &#96;sessionStorage.setItem&#96; in try/catch, resize/compress before storing, or upload immediately and pass only &#96;storageId&#96;.\\\"}\"},\"status\":\"completed\",\"context\":{\"composers\":[],\"selectedCommits\":[],\"selectedPullRequests\":[],\"selectedImages\":[],\"folderSelections\":[],\"fileSelections\":[],\"selections\":[],\"terminalSelections\":[],\"selectedDocs\":[],\"externalLinks\":[],\"cursorRules\":[],\"cursorCommands\":[],\"gitPRDiffSelections\":[],\"subagentSelections\":[],\"browserSelections\":[],\"mentions\":{\"composers\":{},\"selectedCommits\":{},\"selectedPullRequests\":{},\"gitDiff\":[],\"gitDiffFromBranchToMain\":[],\"selectedImages\":{},\"folderSelections\":{},\"fileSelections\":{},\"terminalFiles\":{},\"selections\":{},\"terminalSelections\":{},\"selectedDocs\":{},\"externalLinks\":{},\"diffHistory\":[],\"cursorRules\":{},\"cursorCommands\":{},\"uiElementSelections\":[],\"consoleLogs\":[],\"ideEditorsState\":[],\"gitPRDiffSelections\":{},\"subagentSelections\":{},\"browserSelections\":{}}},\"generatingBubbleIds\":[],\"isReadingLongFile\":false,\"codeBlockData\":{},\"originalFileStates\":{},\"newlyCreatedFiles\":[],\"newlyCreatedFolders\":[],\"createdAt\":1772682964881,\"hasChangedContext\":false,\"activeTabsShouldBeReactive\":true,\"capabilities\":[{\"type\":30,\"data\":{}},{\"type\":15,\"data\":{\"bubbleDataMap\":\"{}\"}},{\"type\":29,\"data\":{}}],\"name\":\"Migration ---

There **are major issues** in the migration. I ran a static pass over the changed Next.js + Convex surface and a no-emit typecheck (`pnpm exec tsc --noEmit --incremental false`, passed), and found the following:

## 1) Critical Findings

- **Convex function-kind mismatch (action called as mutation) can fail at runtime and is currently masked by unsafe refs**
  - Files: `app/submit/page.tsx`, `convex/ai.ts`, `src/lib/convex-refs.ts`
  - Why: `ai:analyzeVehicle` is declared as an **action**, but the client calls it through `useMutation(mutationRef(...))`.
  
```38:42:app/submit/page.tsx
const generateUploadUrl = useMutation(mutationRef("files:generateUploadUrl"));
const registerUpload = useMutation(mutationRef("files:registerUpload"));
const createSighting = useMutation(mutationRef("sightings:create"));
const analyzeVehicle = useMutation(mutationRef("ai:analyzeVehicle"));
const ingestSighting = useMutation(mutationRef("ragIngest:ingestSighting"));
```

```100:104:convex/ai.ts
export const analyzeVehicle = actionGeneric({
  args: {
    imageUrl: v.string(),
  },
```

- **Render-time `Date.now()` passed to live Convex queries causes subscription churn / cache instability**
  - File: `app/sightings/page.tsx`
  - Why: `nowMs` changes on every render, so query args constantly change, forcing re-subscription and avoidable backend load.

```15:30:app/sightings/page.tsx
const nowMs = Date.now();

const sightings = useQuery(queryRef("sightings:list"), {
  hideHidden: true,
  limit: 500,
}) as Sighting[] | undefined;
const trending = useQuery(queryRef("trending:plates"), {
  nowMs,
  limit: 20,
  lookbackHours: 24,
}) as
...
const convoys = useQuery(queryRef("convoy:detect"), {
  nowMs,
```

- **No coordinate validation before write allows invalid geo data into core tables**
  - File: `convex/sightings.ts`
  - Why: `latitude/longitude` are accepted as strings and parsed, but non-finite/out-of-range values are not rejected. This can corrupt geo buckets and break map/proximity logic downstream.

```86:99:convex/sightings.ts
const lat = parseFloat(args.latitude);
const lng = parseFloat(args.longitude);
const normalizedPlate = normalizePlate(args.licensePlate);

const docId = await ctx.db.insert("sightings", {
  id,
  licensePlate: normalizedPlate,
  normalizedPlate,
  vehicleType: args.vehicleType ?? null,
  photoUrl: args.photoUrl,
  latitude: args.latitude,
  longitude: args.longitude,
  geoBucket: toGeoBucket(lat, lng),
```

## 2) Medium Findings

- **Unchecked route param can become `NaN` and flow into Convex calls**
  - File: `app/sighting/[id]/page.tsx`
  - `Number(params.id)` is not validated before use.

- **Upload flow uses `as never` to bypass storage-id typing**
  - File: `app/submit/page.tsx`
  - `storageId` and `imageStorageId` are force-cast, hiding real type mismatches.

- **RAG plate scoring heuristic is effectively broken**
  - Files: `app/plate/[licensePlate]/page.tsx`, `convex/agents.ts`
  - `normalizePlate(args.query)` is computed from full natural-language query; plate bonus rarely matches chunk text.

- **Submit pipeline reports total failure even after successful sighting creation if RAG ingest fails**
  - File: `app/submit/page.tsx`
  - `ingestSighting` is post-create but still inside the main try path; failure can trigger user retry and duplicate submissions.

- **Indexes exist but several Convex handlers still do collect+filter scans**
  - Files: `convex/sightings.ts`, `convex/votes.ts`, `convex/proximity.ts`, `convex/recentPlates.ts`
  - This is a maintainability/perf risk as data grows.

- **OAuth route migration gap likely**
  - Files: `app/` (missing `oauth/callback`), `server/_core/oauth.ts`, `constants/oauth.ts`
  - Previous callback path still exists in backend/constants, but no App Router callback page now.

## 3) Low Findings

- **Camera handoff can exceed sessionStorage quota on large captures**
  - Files: `app/camera/page.tsx`, `app/submit/page.tsx`

- **Convex client silently falls back to placeholder URL**
  - File: `src/lib/convex-client.tsx`
  - Misconfiguration is masked and fails late.

- **Alias ambiguity/duplication increases migration drift risk**
  - Files: `src/lib/device-id.ts`, `lib/device-id.ts`, `tsconfig.json`
  - Two different `getDeviceId` implementations coexist under overlapping `@/*` paths.

## 4) Suggested Fixes

- **Fix function-kind wiring first**
  - Switch to generated Convex refs (`convex/_generated/api`), use `useAction` for `ai:analyzeVehicle`, keep `useMutation` only for mutations.
  - Remove `makeFunctionReference` string-based casts from `src/lib/convex-refs.ts`.

- **Stabilize time-dependent queries**
  - Replace render-time `Date.now()` args with stable state (`useState(() => Date.now())`) and controlled refresh intervals, or compute cutoff server-side.

- **Add strict geo validation in write path**
  - In `sightings:create`, reject non-finite and out-of-range lat/lon before insert.
  - Consider storing numeric coordinates in schema (or validated normalized strings) consistently.

- **Harden upload submit transaction boundary**
  - Treat RAG ingest as best-effort post-step (separate try/catch), so primary submission success is preserved.
  - Replace `as never` with explicit `Id<"_storage">` typing/validation.

- **Repair RAG plate targeting**
  - Pass plate as a separate argument to `agents:runRagAgent` and score against normalized plate only.

- **Address scaling hotspots**
  - Replace `collect().filter(...)` patterns with index-constrained queries and pagination in high-traffic functions.



---

## Re-review: Previously Critical Issues

All five previously critical issues are addressed:

---

### 1. Action vs mutation mismatch — **fixed**

`app/submit/page.tsx` now uses the action correctly:

```40:41:app/submit/page.tsx
  const analyzeVehicle = useAction(actionRef("ai:analyzeVehicle"));
  const ingestSighting = useMutation(mutationRef("ragIngest:ingestSighting"));
```

`actionRef` is used with `useAction` for `ai:analyzeVehicle`; mutations still use `useMutation` and `mutationRef`.

---

### 2. Unstable `nowMs` query args — **fixed**

`app/sightings/page.tsx` uses stable state and a 15s refresh:

```15:19:app/sightings/page.tsx
  const [nowMs, setNowMs] = useState(() => Date.now());
  useEffect(() => {
    const intervalId = window.setInterval(() => setNowMs(Date.now()), 15_000);
    return () => window.clearInterval(intervalId);
  }, []);
```

`nowMs` no longer changes every render, so query subscriptions are stable.

---

### 3. Coordinate validation — **fixed**

`convex/sightings.ts` validates coordinates before insert:

```86:91:convex/sightings.ts
    if (!Number.isFinite(lat) || !Number.isFinite(lng)) {
      throw new Error("Invalid latitude/longitude. Coordinates must be finite numbers.");
    }
    if (lat < -90 || lat > 90 || lng < -180 || lng > 180) {
      throw new Error("Invalid latitude/longitude range.");
    }
```

Non-finite and out-of-range values are rejected.

---

### 4. NaN route params — **fixed**

`app/sighting/[id]/page.tsx` validates the ID and skips queries when invalid:

```13:39:app/sighting/[id]/page.tsx
  const sightingId = Number(params.id);
  const hasValidId = Number.isInteger(sightingId) && sightingId > 0;

  const sighting = useQuery(queryRef("sightings:getById"), hasValidId ? { id: sightingId } : "skip") as
    ...
  const vote = useQuery(queryRef("votes:getUserVote"), hasValidId
    ? {
    deviceId: getDeviceId(),
    sightingId,
      }
    : "skip") as ...
  ...
  if (!hasValidId) {
    return <section className="panel">Invalid sighting id.</section>;
  }
```

Invalid IDs no longer reach Convex; the page shows “Invalid sighting id.” instead.

---

### 5. Submit post-create ingest behavior — **fixed**

`app/submit/page.tsx` isolates RAG ingest in its own try/catch:

```181:192:app/submit/page.tsx
      try {
        await ingestSighting({
          sightingId: created.id,
          createdByDeviceId: deviceId,
          nowMs: Date.now(),
        });
      } catch (error) {
        console.warn("RAG ingest skipped:", error);
      }

      setStatus(`Submitted successfully. Sighting #${created.id} created.`);
```

Ingest failure no longer affects the success message or causes duplicate submissions.

---

## Summary

No remaining critical or medium findings for these five areas. All fixes are in place and behave as intended.

```
-
-        {/* ── FAB camera button ── */}

-    &lt;/ScreenContainer&gt;
-  );
-}

-  },
-
-  // Stats strip

-    flexDirection: "row", alignItems: "center", gap: 8,
-    zIndex: 10,

-  statsText: {

-    backgroundColor: "rgba(13,13,26,0.85)",
-    paddingHorizontal: 10, paddingVertical: 4, borderRadius: 10,

-  livePill: {

-    backgroundColor: "rgba(34,197,94,0.15)",
-    borderWidth: 1, borderColor: "rgba(34,197,94,0.3)",
-    paddingHorizontal: 8, paddingVertical: 4, borderRadius: 10,

diff --git a/app/(tabs)/sightings.tsx b/app/(tabs)/sightings.tsx
deleted file mode 100644
index 80d9940..0000000
--- a/app/(tabs)/sightings.tsx
+++ /dev/null
@@ -1,459 +0,0 @@
-import { useState, useEffect, useMemo, useRef } from "react";
-import {
-  View, Text, FlatList, Pressable, Image, Animated,
-  ActivityIndicator, RefreshControl, StyleSheet, ScrollView,
-  PanResponder,
-} from "react-native";
-import { router } from "expo-router";
-import { ScreenContainer } from "@/components/screen-container";
-import { trpc } from "@/lib/trpc";
-import { getDeviceId } from "@/lib/device-id";
-
-const AGENCY_COLORS: Record&lt;string, string&gt; = {
-  ICE: "#EF4444", CBP: "#F59E0B", DHS: "#8B5CF6",
-  FBI: "#3B82F6", DEA: "#10B981", ATF: "#F97316",
-  USMS: "#EC4899", Other: "#6B7280",
-};
-
-type SightingItem = {
-  id: number;
-  licensePlate: string;
-  vehicleType: string | null;
-  photoUrl: string;
-  locationAddress: string | null;
-  latitude: string;
-  longitude: string;
-  credibilityScore: string;
-  upvotes: number;
-  downvotes: number;
-  createdAt: Date;
-  agencyType?: string | null;
-};
-
-type TrendingPlate = {
-  plate: string;
-  count: number;
-  lastSeen: Date;
-  agencyType: string | null;
-  avgCredibility: number;
-};
-
-type ConvoyAlert = {
-  centerLat: number;
-  centerLon: number;
-  vehicleCount: number;
-  plates: string[];
-  agencies: string[];
-  firstSeen: Date;
-  lastSeen: Date;
-};
-
-function getCredColor(score: string | number): string {
-  const n = typeof score === "string" ? parseFloat(score) : score;
-  if (n &gt;= 70) return "#22C55E";
-  if (n &gt;= 40) return "#F59E0B";
-  return "#EF4444";
-}
-
-function timeAgo(date: Date): string {
-  const diff = Date.now() - new Date(date).getTime();
-  const mins = Math.floor(diff / 60000);
-  if (mins &lt; 1) return "just now";
-  if (mins &lt; 60) return &#96;${mins}m ago&#96;;
-  const hrs = Math.floor(mins / 60);
-  if (hrs &lt; 24) return &#96;${hrs}h ago&#96;;
-  return &#96;${Math.floor(hrs / 24)}d ago&#96;;
-}
-
-function distKm(lat1: number, lon1: number, lat2: number, lon2: number): number {
-  const R = 6371;
-  const dLat = ((lat2 - lat1) * Math.PI) / 180;
-  const dLon = ((lon2 - lon1) * Math.PI) / 180;
-  const a = Math.sin(dLat / 2) ** 2 + Math.cos(lat1 * Math.PI / 180) * Math.cos(lat2 * Math.PI / 180) * Math.sin(dLon / 2) ** 2;
-  return R * 2 * Math.atan2(Math.sqrt(a), Math.sqrt(1 - a));
-}
-
-type Tab = "recent" | "trending" | "convoys";
-
-export default function SightingsScreen() {
-  const [activeTab, setActiveTab] = useState&lt;Tab&gt;("recent");
-  const [sortBy, setSortBy] = useState&lt;"recent" | "credibility"&gt;("recent");
-  const [userLocation, setUserLocation] = useState&lt;{ lat: number; lon: number } | null&gt;(null);
-
-  const { data: sightings, isLoading, refetch, isRefetching } = trpc.sightings.list.useQuery({ hideHidden: true, limit: 100 });
-  const { data: trendingData } = trpc.trending.plates.useQuery({ limit: 15 });
-  const { data: convoyData } = trpc.convoy.detect.useQuery({ radiusKm: 0.5, windowMinutes: 15, minVehicles: 2 });
-
-  useEffect(() =&gt; {
-    if (typeof navigator !== "undefined" &amp;&amp; navigator.geolocation) {
-      navigator.geolocation.getCurrentPosition(
-        (pos) =&gt; setUserLocation({ lat: pos.coords.latitude, lon: pos.coords.longitude }),
-        () =&gt; {}
-      );
-    }
-  }, []);
-
-  const sortedSightings = useMemo(() =&gt; {
-    if (!sightings) return [];
-    return [...sightings].sort((a, b) =&gt; {
-      if (sortBy === "credibility") return parseFloat(b.credibilityScore as string) - parseFloat(a.credibilityScore as string);
-      return new Date(b.createdAt).getTime() - new Date(a.createdAt).getTime();
-    });
-  }, [sightings, sortBy]);
-
-  const voteOnSighting = trpc.votes.cast.useMutation();
-
-  const renderSightingCard = ({ item }: { item: SightingItem }) =&gt; {
-    const cred = parseFloat(item.credibilityScore as string);
-    const credColor = getCredColor(cred);
-    const agencyColor = item.agencyType ? (AGENCY_COLORS[item.agencyType] || "#6B7280") : null;
-    const dist = userLocation
-      ? distKm(userLocation.lat, userLocation.lon, parseFloat(item.latitude), parseFloat(item.longitude))
-      : null;
-    const distLabel = dist !== null
-      ? dist &lt; 1 ? &#96;${(dist * 1000).toFixed(0)}m away&#96; : &#96;${dist.toFixed(1)}km away&#96;
-      : null;
-    const isConfirmed = item.upvotes &gt;= 3 &amp;&amp; cred &gt;= 60;
-
-    // Swipe-to-vote via PanResponder
-    const translateX = useRef(new Animated.Value(0)).current;
-    const swipeHint = useRef&lt;"upvote" | "downvote" | null&gt;(null);
-
-    const panResponder = PanResponder.create({
-      onMoveShouldSetPanResponder: (_, g) =&gt; Math.abs(g.dx) &gt; 10 &amp;&amp; Math.abs(g.dx) &gt; Math.abs(g.dy),
-      onPanResponderMove: (_, g) =&gt; {
-        translateX.setValue(g.dx);
-        swipeHint.current = g.dx &gt; 0 ? "upvote" : "downvote";
-      },
-      onPanResponderRelease: async (_, g) =&gt; {
-        if (Math.abs(g.dx) &gt; 60) {
-          const voteType = g.dx &gt; 0 ? "upvote" : "downvote";
-          const deviceId = await getDeviceId();
-          voteOnSighting.mutate({ deviceId, sightingId: item.id, voteType });
-        }
-        Animated.spring(translateX, { toValue: 0, useNativeDriver: true }).start();
-        swipeHint.current = null;
-      },
-    });
-
-    return (
-      &lt;Animated.View
-        {...panResponder.panHandlers}
-        style={{ transform: [{ translateX }] }}
-      &gt;
-      &lt;Pressable
-        onPress={() =&gt; router.push(&#96;/sighting/${item.id}&#96; as any)}
-        style={({ pressed }) =&gt; [styles.card, { opacity: pressed ? 0.85 : 1 }]}
-      &gt;
-        {/* Photo */}
-        &lt;View style={{ position: "relative" }}&gt;
-          &lt;Image source={{ uri: item.photoUrl }} style={styles.cardPhoto} resizeMode="cover" /&gt;
-          {item.agencyType &amp;&amp; agencyColor &amp;&amp; (
-            &lt;View style={[styles.cardAgencyBadge, { backgroundColor: agencyColor + "dd" }]}&gt;
-              &lt;Text style={styles.cardAgencyText}&gt;{item.agencyType}&lt;/Text&gt;
-            &lt;/View&gt;
-          )}
-          {isConfirmed &amp;&amp; (
-            &lt;View style={styles.cardConfirmedBadge}&gt;
-              &lt;Text style={styles.cardConfirmedText}&gt;✓&lt;/Text&gt;
-            &lt;/View&gt;
-          )}
-        &lt;/View&gt;
-
-        {/* Info */}
-        &lt;View style={styles.cardInfo}&gt;
-          &lt;View style={{ flexDirection: "row", justifyContent: "space-between", alignItems: "flex-start" }}&gt;
-            &lt;Text style={styles.cardPlate}&gt;{item.licensePlate}&lt;/Text&gt;
-            &lt;Text style={styles.cardTime}&gt;{timeAgo(item.createdAt)}&lt;/Text&gt;
-          &lt;/View&gt;
-
-          {item.vehicleType &amp;&amp; &lt;Text style={styles.cardVehicleType}&gt;{item.vehicleType}&lt;/Text&gt;}
-
-          {item.locationAddress &amp;&amp; (
-            &lt;Text style={styles.cardAddress} numberOfLines={1}&gt;{item.locationAddress}&lt;/Text&gt;
-          )}
-
-          &lt;View style={{ flexDirection: "row", alignItems: "center", gap: 8, marginTop: 6 }}&gt;
-            {/* Cred pill */}
-            &lt;View style={[styles.credPill, { backgroundColor: credColor + "22", borderColor: credColor + "55" }]}&gt;
-              &lt;View style={[styles.credDot, { backgroundColor: credColor }]} /&gt;
-              &lt;Text style={[styles.credPillText, { color: credColor }]}&gt;{cred.toFixed(0)}%&lt;/Text&gt;
-            &lt;/View&gt;
-            &lt;Text style={styles.voteText}&gt;{item.upvotes + item.downvotes} votes&lt;/Text&gt;
-            {distLabel &amp;&amp; &lt;Text style={styles.distText}&gt;· {distLabel}&lt;/Text&gt;}
-          &lt;/View&gt;
-        &lt;/View&gt;
-      &lt;/Pressable&gt;
-      &lt;/Animated.View&gt;
-    );
-  };
-
-  const renderTrendingCard = (item: TrendingPlate, index: number) =&gt; {
-    const agencyColor = item.agencyType ? (AGENCY_COLORS[item.agencyType] || "#6B7280") : "#6B7280";
-    return (
-      &lt;Pressable
-        key={item.plate}
-        onPress={() =&gt; router.push(&#96;/plate/${encodeURIComponent(item.plate)}&#96; as any)}
-        style={({ pressed }) =&gt; [styles.trendCard, { opacity: pressed ? 0.85 : 1 }]}
-      &gt;
-        &lt;View style={styles.trendRank}&gt;
-          &lt;Text style={styles.trendRankText}&gt;#{index + 1}&lt;/Text&gt;
-        &lt;/View&gt;
-        &lt;View style={{ flex: 1 }}&gt;
-          &lt;View style={{ flexDirection: "row", alignItems: "center", gap: 8, marginBottom: 4 }}&gt;
-            &lt;Text style={styles.trendPlate}&gt;{item.plate}&lt;/Text&gt;
-            {item.agencyType &amp;&amp; (
-              &lt;View style={[styles.trendAgencyBadge, { backgroundColor: agencyColor + "22", borderColor: agencyColor + "55" }]}&gt;
-                &lt;Text style={[styles.trendAgencyText, { color: agencyColor }]}&gt;{item.agencyType}&lt;/Text&gt;
-              &lt;/View&gt;
-            )}
-          &lt;/View&gt;
-          &lt;View style={{ flexDirection: "row", gap: 12 }}&gt;
-            &lt;Text style={styles.trendStat}&gt;{item.count} sightings&lt;/Text&gt;
-            &lt;Text style={styles.trendStat}&gt;Last: {timeAgo(item.lastSeen)}&lt;/Text&gt;
-            &lt;Text style={[styles.trendStat, { color: getCredColor(item.avgCredibility) }]}&gt;
-              {item.avgCredibility.toFixed(0)}% cred
-            &lt;/Text&gt;
-          &lt;/View&gt;
-        &lt;/View&gt;
-        &lt;Text style={styles.trendArrow}&gt;→&lt;/Text&gt;
-      &lt;/Pressable&gt;
-    );
-  };
-
-  const renderConvoyCard = (convoy: ConvoyAlert, index: number) =&gt; (
-    &lt;View key={index} style={styles.convoyCard}&gt;
-      &lt;View style={styles.convoyHeader}&gt;
-        &lt;View style={styles.convoyAlertBadge}&gt;
-          &lt;Text style={styles.convoyAlertText}&gt;⚠ CONVOY&lt;/Text&gt;
-        &lt;/View&gt;
-        &lt;Text style={styles.convoyTime}&gt;{timeAgo(convoy.lastSeen)}&lt;/Text&gt;
-      &lt;/View&gt;
-      &lt;Text style={styles.convoyVehicleCount}&gt;{convoy.vehicleCount} vehicles&lt;/Text&gt;
-      {convoy.agencies.length &gt; 0 &amp;&amp; (
-        &lt;View style={{ flexDirection: "row", gap: 6, flexWrap: "wrap", marginBottom: 8 }}&gt;
-          {convoy.agencies.map((a) =&gt; (
-            &lt;View key={a} style={[styles.convoyAgencyBadge, { backgroundColor: (AGENCY_COLORS[a] || "#6B7280") + "22", borderColor: (AGENCY_COLORS[a] || "#6B7280") + "55" }]}&gt;
-              &lt;Text style={[styles.convoyAgencyText, { color: AGENCY_COLORS[a] || "#6B7280" }]}&gt;{a}&lt;/Text&gt;
-            &lt;/View&gt;
-          ))}
-        &lt;/View&gt;
-      )}
-      &lt;Text style={styles.convoyPlates} numberOfLines={2}&gt;
-        Plates: {convoy.plates.join(", ")}
-      &lt;/Text&gt;
-      &lt;Text style={styles.convoyCoords}&gt;
-        {convoy.centerLat.toFixed(4)}, {convoy.centerLon.toFixed(4)}
-      &lt;/Text&gt;
-    &lt;/View&gt;
-  );
-
-  return (
-    &lt;ScreenContainer containerClassName="bg-[#0d0d1a]"&gt;
-      &lt;View style={{ flex: 1 }}&gt;
-
-        {/* ── Header ── */}
-        &lt;View style={styles.header}&gt;
-          &lt;Text style={styles.headerTitle}&gt;Reports&lt;/Text&gt;
-          {activeTab === "recent" &amp;&amp; (
-            &lt;Pressable
-              onPress={() =&gt; setSortBy((v) =&gt; v === "recent" ? "credibility" : "recent")}
-              style={({ pressed }) =&gt; [styles.sortBtn, { opacity: pressed ? 0.8 : 1 }]}
-            &gt;
-              &lt;Text style={styles.sortBtnText}&gt;
-                {sortBy === "recent" ? "⏱ Recent" : "✓ Verified"}
-              &lt;/Text&gt;
-            &lt;/Pressable&gt;
-          )}
-        &lt;/View&gt;
-
-        {/* ── Tab bar ── */}
-        &lt;View style={styles.tabBar}&gt;
-          {(["recent", "trending", "convoys"] as Tab[]).map((tab) =&gt; (
-            &lt;Pressable
-              key={tab}
-              onPress={() =&gt; setActiveTab(tab)}
-              style={[styles.tab, activeTab === tab &amp;&amp; styles.tabActive]}
-            &gt;
-              &lt;Text style={[styles.tabText, activeTab === tab &amp;&amp; styles.tabTextActive]}&gt;
-                {tab === "recent" ? "Recent" : tab === "trending" ? "Trending" : "Convoys"}
-              &lt;/Text&gt;
-              {tab === "convoys" &amp;&amp; (convoyData?.length ?? 0) &gt; 0 &amp;&amp; (
-                &lt;View style={styles.tabBadge}&gt;
-                  &lt;Text style={styles.tabBadgeText}&gt;{convoyData!.length}&lt;/Text&gt;
-                &lt;/View&gt;
-              )}
-            &lt;/Pressable&gt;
-          ))}
-        &lt;/View&gt;
-
-        {/* ── Content ── */}
-        {activeTab === "recent" &amp;&amp; (
-          isLoading ? (
-            &lt;View style={{ flex: 1, alignItems: "center", justifyContent: "center" }}&gt;
-              &lt;ActivityIndicator size="large" color="#3B82F6" /&gt;
-            &lt;/View&gt;
-          ) : (
-            &lt;FlatList
-              data={sortedSightings as SightingItem[]}
-              renderItem={renderSightingCard}
-              keyExtractor={(item) =&gt; item.id.toString()}
-              contentContainerStyle={{ paddingVertical: 8, paddingHorizontal: 12, gap: 8 }}
-              refreshControl={
-                &lt;RefreshControl refreshing={isRefetching} onRefresh={refetch} tintColor="#3B82F6" /&gt;
-              }
-              ListEmptyComponent={
-                &lt;View style={{ flex: 1, alignItems: "center", justifyContent: "center", padding: 40 }}&gt;
-                  &lt;Text style={{ color: "#555", textAlign: "center" }}&gt;No sightings yet. Be the first to report!&lt;/Text&gt;
-                &lt;/View&gt;
-              }
-            /&gt;
-          )
-        )}
-
-        {activeTab === "trending" &amp;&amp; (
-          &lt;ScrollView contentContainerStyle={{ padding: 12, gap: 8 }}&gt;
-            &lt;Text style={styles.sectionSubtitle}&gt;Most reported in the last 24 hours&lt;/Text&gt;
-            {!trendingData || trendingData.length === 0 ? (
-              &lt;Text style={{ color: "#555", textAlign: "center", marginTop: 40 }}&gt;No trending plates yet.&lt;/Text&gt;
-            ) : (
-              (trendingData as TrendingPlate[]).map((item, i) =&gt; renderTrendingCard(item, i))
-            )}
-          &lt;/ScrollView&gt;
-        )}
-
-        {activeTab === "convoys" &amp;&amp; (
-          &lt;ScrollView contentContainerStyle={{ padding: 12, gap: 10 }}&gt;
-            &lt;Text style={styles.sectionSubtitle}&gt;Multiple vehicles spotted together (last 15 min)&lt;/Text&gt;
-            {!convoyData || convoyData.length === 0 ? (
-              &lt;View style={{ alignItems: "center", marginTop: 40 }}&gt;
-                &lt;Text style={{ color: "#22C55E", fontSize: 16, fontWeight: "700", marginBottom: 8 }}&gt;✓ No convoys detected&lt;/Text&gt;
-                &lt;Text style={{ color: "#555", textAlign: "center", fontSize: 13 }}&gt;
-                  No clusters of 2+ vehicles have been reported in the same area within the last 15 minutes.
-                &lt;/Text&gt;
-              &lt;/View&gt;
-            ) : (
-              (convoyData as ConvoyAlert[]).map((c, i) =&gt; renderConvoyCard(c, i))
-            )}
-          &lt;/ScrollView&gt;
-        )}
-      &lt;/View&gt;
-    &lt;/ScreenContainer&gt;
-  );
-}
-
-const styles = StyleSheet.create({
-  header: {
-    flexDirection: "row", justifyContent: "space-between", alignItems: "center",
-    paddingHorizontal: 16, paddingVertical: 18,
-    borderBottomWidth: 1, borderBottomColor: "rgba(255,255,255,0.07)",
-  },
-  headerTitle: { color: "#fff", fontSize: 24, fontWeight: "900", letterSpacing: 0.3 },
-  sortBtn: {
-    paddingHorizontal: 16, paddingVertical: 10, borderRadius: 14,
-    backgroundColor: "rgba(255,255,255,0.07)",
-    borderWidth: 1, borderColor: "rgba(255,255,255,0.12)",
-    minHeight: 40, justifyContent: "center",
-  },
-  sortBtnText: { color: "#aaa", fontSize: 13, fontWeight: "700" },
-
-  tabBar: {
-    flexDirection: "row",
-    borderBottomWidth: 1, borderBottomColor: "rgba(255,255,255,0.07)",
-    paddingHorizontal: 8,
-    gap: 4,
-  },
-  tab: {
-    flex: 1, paddingVertical: 14, alignItems: "center", justifyContent: "center",
-    flexDirection: "row", gap: 6,
-    borderRadius: 10, marginBottom: 4,
-  },
-  tabActive: {
-    borderBottomWidth: 2, borderBottomColor: "#3B82F6",
-    backgroundColor: "rgba(59,130,246,0.08)",
-  },
-  tabText: { color: "#666", fontSize: 14, fontWeight: "700" },
-  tabTextActive: { color: "#3B82F6", fontSize: 14 },
-  tabBadge: {
-    backgroundColor: "#EF4444", borderRadius: 10,
-    paddingHorizontal: 6, paddingVertical: 2,
-    minWidth: 18, alignItems: "center",
-  },
-  tabBadgeText: { color: "#fff", fontSize: 10, fontWeight: "800" },
-
-  sectionSubtitle: { color: "#555", fontSize: 12, marginBottom: 8 },
-
-  // Sighting card
-  card: {
-    backgroundColor: "rgba(255,255,255,0.04)",
-    borderRadius: 16, overflow: "hidden",
-    borderWidth: 1, borderColor: "rgba(255,255,255,0.08)",
-    flexDirection: "row",
-    minHeight: 96,
-  },
-  cardPhoto: { width: 96, height: 96, backgroundColor: "#1a1a2e" },
-  cardAgencyBadge: {
-    position: "absolute", top: 4, left: 4,
-    paddingHorizontal: 6, paddingVertical: 2, borderRadius: 5,
-  },
-  cardAgencyText: { color: "#fff", fontSize: 9, fontWeight: "800", letterSpacing: 0.5 },
-  cardConfirmedBadge: {
-    position: "absolute", bottom: 4, right: 4,
-    backgroundColor: "rgba(34,197,94,0.9)", borderRadius: 5,
-    width: 16, height: 16, alignItems: "center", justifyContent: "center",
-  },
-  cardConfirmedText: { color: "#fff", fontSize: 9, fontWeight: "900" },
-  cardInfo: { flex: 1, padding: 10 },
-  cardPlate: { color: "#fff", fontSize: 16, fontWeight: "900", fontFamily: "monospace", letterSpacing: 1 },
-  cardTime: { color: "#555", fontSize: 11 },
-  cardVehicleType: { color: "#777", fontSize: 11, marginTop: 2 },
-  cardAddress: { color: "#666", fontSize: 11, marginTop: 2 },
-  credPill: {
-    flexDirection: "row", alignItems: "center", gap: 4,
-    borderWidth: 1, borderRadius: 8, paddingHorizontal: 6, paddingVertical: 2,
-  },
-  credDot: { width: 5, height: 5, borderRadius: 3 },
-  credPillText: { fontSize: 10, fontWeight: "700" },
-  voteText: { color: "#555", fontSize: 11 },
-  distText: { color: "#555", fontSize: 11 },
-
-  // Trending card
-  trendCard: {
-    flexDirection: "row", alignItems: "center", gap: 12,
-    backgroundColor: "rgba(255,255,255,0.04)",
-    borderRadius: 14, padding: 14,
-    borderWidth: 1, borderColor: "rgba(255,255,255,0.07)",
-  },
-  trendRank: {
-    width: 32, height: 32, borderRadius: 16,
-    backgroundColor: "rgba(59,130,246,0.15)",
-    borderWidth: 1, borderColor: "rgba(59,130,246,0.3)",
-    alignItems: "center", justifyContent: "center",
-  },
-  trendRankText: { color: "#3B82F6", fontSize: 12, fontWeight: "800" },
-  trendPlate: { color: "#fff", fontSize: 16, fontWeight: "900", fontFamily: "monospace", letterSpacing: 1 },
-  trendAgencyBadge: { borderWidth: 1, borderRadius: 6, paddingHorizontal: 6, paddingVertical: 2 },
-  trendAgencyText: { fontSize: 10, fontWeight: "800", letterSpacing: 0.5 },
-  trendStat: { color: "#666", fontSize: 11 },
-  trendArrow: { color: "#444", fontSize: 16 },
-
-  // Convoy card
-  convoyCard: {
-    backgroundColor: "rgba(239,68,68,0.07)",
-    borderRadius: 14, padding: 14,
-    borderWidth: 1, borderColor: "rgba(239,68,68,0.25)",
-  },
-  convoyHeader: { flexDirection: "row", justifyContent: "space-between", alignItems: "center", marginBottom: 8 },
-  convoyAlertBadge: {

-    borderWidth: 1, borderColor: "rgba(239,68,68,0.4)",

-  convoyAlertText: { color: "#EF4444", fontSize: 11, fontWeight: "800", letterSpacing: 1 },
-  convoyTime: { color: "#666", fontSize: 11 },
```
