-  convoyAgencyBadge: { borderWidth: 1, borderRadius: 6, paddingHorizontal: 8, paddingVertical: 3 },
-  convoyAgencyText: { fontSize: 11, fontWeight: "800" },
-  convoyPlates: { color: "#aaa", fontSize: 12, fontFamily: "monospace", marginBottom: 4 },
-  convoyCoords: { color: "#555", fontSize: 11, fontFamily: "monospace" },
-});
diff --git a/app/_layout.tsx b/app/_layout.tsx
deleted file mode 100644
index e312a25..0000000
--- a/app/_layout.tsx
+++ /dev/null
@@ -1,119 +0,0 @@
-import "@/global.css";
-import { QueryClient, QueryClientProvider } from "@tanstack/react-query";
-import { Stack } from "expo-router";
-import { StatusBar } from "expo-status-bar";
-import { useCallback, useEffect, useMemo, useState } from "react";
-import { GestureHandlerRootView } from "react-native-gesture-handler";
-import "react-native-reanimated";
-import { Platform } from "react-native";
-import "@/lib/_core/nativewind-pressable";
-import { ThemeProvider } from "@/lib/theme-provider";
-import {
-  SafeAreaFrameContext,
-  SafeAreaInsetsContext,
-  SafeAreaProvider,
-  initialWindowMetrics,
-} from "react-native-safe-area-context";
-import type { EdgeInsets, Metrics, Rect } from "react-native-safe-area-context";
-
-import { trpc, createTRPCClient } from "@/lib/trpc";
-import { initManusRuntime, subscribeSafeAreaInsets } from "@/lib/_core/manus-runtime";
-
-const DEFAULT_WEB_INSETS: EdgeInsets = { top: 0, right: 0, bottom: 0, left: 0 };
-const DEFAULT_WEB_FRAME: Rect = { x: 0, y: 0, width: 0, height: 0 };
-
-export const unstable_settings = {
-  anchor: "(tabs)",
-};
-
-export default function RootLayout() {
-  const initialInsets = initialWindowMetrics?.insets ?? DEFAULT_WEB_INSETS;
-  const initialFrame = initialWindowMetrics?.frame ?? DEFAULT_WEB_FRAME;
-
-  const [insets, setInsets] = useState&lt;EdgeInsets&gt;(initialInsets);
-  const [frame, setFrame] = useState&lt;Rect&gt;(initialFrame);
-
-  // Initialize Manus runtime for cookie injection from parent container
-  useEffect(() =&gt; {
-    initManusRuntime();
-  }, []);
-
-  const handleSafeAreaUpdate = useCallback((metrics: Metrics) =&gt; {
-    setInsets(metrics.insets);
-    setFrame(metrics.frame);
-  }, []);
-
-  useEffect(() =&gt; {
-    if (Platform.OS !== "web") return;
-    const unsubscribe = subscribeSafeAreaInsets(handleSafeAreaUpdate);
-    return () =&gt; unsubscribe();
-  }, [handleSafeAreaUpdate]);
-
-  // Create clients once and reuse them
-  const [queryClient] = useState(
-    () =&gt;
-      new QueryClient({
-        defaultOptions: {
-          queries: {
-            // Disable automatic refetching on window focus for mobile
-            refetchOnWindowFocus: false,
-            // Retry failed requests once
-            retry: 1,
-          },
-        },
-      }),
-  );
-  const [trpcClient] = useState(() =&gt; createTRPCClient());
-
-  // Ensure minimum 8px padding for top and bottom on mobile
-  const providerInitialMetrics = useMemo(() =&gt; {
-    const metrics = initialWindowMetrics ?? { insets: initialInsets, frame: initialFrame };
-    return {
-      ...metrics,
-      insets: {
-        ...metrics.insets,
-        top: Math.max(metrics.insets.top, 16),
-        bottom: Math.max(metrics.insets.bottom, 12),
-      },
-    };
-  }, [initialInsets, initialFrame]);
-
-  const content = (
-    &lt;GestureHandlerRootView style={{ flex: 1 }}&gt;
-      &lt;trpc.Provider client={trpcClient} queryClient={queryClient}&gt;
-        &lt;QueryClientProvider client={queryClient}&gt;
-          {/* Default to hiding native headers so raw route segments don't appear (e.g. "(tabs)", "products/[id]"). */}
-          {/* If a screen needs the native header, explicitly enable it and set a human title via Stack.Screen options. */}
-          {/* in order for ios apps tab switching to work properly, use presentation: "fullScreenModal" for login page, whenever you decide to use presentation: "modal*/}
-          &lt;Stack screenOptions={{ headerShown: false }}&gt;
-            &lt;Stack.Screen name="(tabs)" /&gt;
-            &lt;Stack.Screen name="oauth/callback" /&gt;
-          &lt;/Stack&gt;
-          &lt;StatusBar style="auto" /&gt;
-        &lt;/QueryClientProvider&gt;
-      &lt;/trpc.Provider&gt;
-    &lt;/GestureHandlerRootView&gt;
-  );
-
-  const shouldOverrideSafeArea = Platform.OS === "web";
-
-  if (shouldOverrideSafeArea) {
-    return (
-      &lt;ThemeProvider&gt;
-        &lt;SafeAreaProvider initialMetrics={providerInitialMetrics}&gt;
-          &lt;SafeAreaFrameContext.Provider value={frame}&gt;
-            &lt;SafeAreaInsetsContext.Provider value={insets}&gt;
-              {content}
-            &lt;/SafeAreaInsetsContext.Provider&gt;
-          &lt;/SafeAreaFrameContext.Provider&gt;
-        &lt;/SafeAreaProvider&gt;
-      &lt;/ThemeProvider&gt;
-    );
-  }
-
-  return (
-    &lt;ThemeProvider&gt;
-      &lt;SafeAreaProvider initialMetrics={providerInitialMetrics}&gt;{content}&lt;/SafeAreaProvider&gt;
-    &lt;/ThemeProvider&gt;
-  );
-}
diff --git a/app/camera.tsx b/app/camera.tsx
deleted file mode 100644
index 5765f55..0000000
--- a/app/camera.tsx
+++ /dev/null
@@ -1,389 +0,0 @@
-import { useState, useRef, useEffect } from "react";
-import { View, Text, Pressable, ActivityIndicator, Alert, StyleSheet } from "react-native";
-import { router } from "expo-router";
-
-export default function CameraScreen() {
-  const [isCapturing, setIsCapturing] = useState(false);
-  const [stream, setStream] = useState&lt;MediaStream | null&gt;(null);
-  const [hasPermission, setHasPermission] = useState&lt;boolean | null&gt;(null);
-  const [gpsReady, setGpsReady] = useState(false);
-  const [gpsCoords, setGpsCoords] = useState&lt;{ lat: number; lon: number } | null&gt;(null);
-  const [captureFlash, setCaptureFlash] = useState(false);
-  const videoRef = useRef&lt;HTMLVideoElement&gt;(null);
-  const canvasRef = useRef&lt;HTMLCanvasElement&gt;(null);
-
-  useEffect(() =&gt; {
-    requestCameraAccess();
-    // Pre-warm GPS
-    if (typeof navigator !== "undefined" &amp;&amp; navigator.geolocation) {
-      navigator.geolocation.getCurrentPosition(
-        (pos) =&gt; {
-          setGpsReady(true);
-          setGpsCoords({ lat: pos.coords.latitude, lon: pos.coords.longitude });
-        },
-        () =&gt; setGpsReady(false),
-        { enableHighAccuracy: true, timeout: 15000 }
-      );
-    }
-    return () =&gt; {
-      if (stream) stream.getTracks().forEach((t) =&gt; t.stop());
-    };
-  }, []);
-
-  const requestCameraAccess = async () =&gt; {
-    try {
-      const mediaStream = await navigator.mediaDevices.getUserMedia({
-        video: { facingMode: "environment", width: { ideal: 1920 }, height: { ideal: 1080 } },
-      });
-      setStream(mediaStream);
-      setHasPermission(true);
-      if (videoRef.current) videoRef.current.srcObject = mediaStream;
-    } catch {
-      setHasPermission(false);
-    }
-  };
-
-  const handleCapture = async () =&gt; {
-    if (!videoRef.current || !canvasRef.current || isCapturing) return;
-    setIsCapturing(true);
-    setCaptureFlash(true);
-    setTimeout(() =&gt; setCaptureFlash(false), 200);
-
-    try {
-      const canvas = canvasRef.current;
-      const video = videoRef.current;
-      canvas.width = video.videoWidth || 1280;
-      canvas.height = video.videoHeight || 720;
-      const ctx = canvas.getContext("2d");
-      ctx?.drawImage(video, 0, 0);
-
-      const photoBase64 = canvas.toDataURL("image/jpeg", 0.85).split(",")[1];
-      const photoUri = canvas.toDataURL("image/jpeg", 0.85);
-
-      // Get fresh GPS if we don't have it
-      let location = gpsCoords ? { latitude: gpsCoords.lat, longitude: gpsCoords.lon } : null;
-      let locationAccuracy: number | null = null;
-
-      if (!location) {
-        try {
-          const position = await new Promise&lt;GeolocationPosition&gt;((resolve, reject) =&gt; {
-            navigator.geolocation.getCurrentPosition(resolve, reject, {
-              enableHighAccuracy: true, timeout: 10000,
-            });
-          });
-          location = { latitude: position.coords.latitude, longitude: position.coords.longitude };
-          locationAccuracy = position.coords.accuracy;
-        } catch {
-          Alert.alert("Location Required", "GPS coordinates are needed to submit a sighting. Please enable location permissions.");
-          setIsCapturing(false);
-          return;
-        }
-      }
-
-      // Stop camera stream before navigating
-      if (stream) stream.getTracks().forEach((t) =&gt; t.stop());
-
-      router.push({
-        pathname: "/submit" as any,
-        params: {
-          photoUri,
-          photoBase64,
-          latitude: location.latitude.toString(),
-          longitude: location.longitude.toString(),
-          locationAccuracy: locationAccuracy?.toString() || "",
-          exifData: JSON.stringify({}),
-        },
-      });
-    } catch {
-      Alert.alert("Error", "Failed to capture photo. Please try again.");
-    } finally {
-      setIsCapturing(false);
-    }
-  };
-
-  const handleClose = () =&gt; {
-    if (stream) stream.getTracks().forEach((t) =&gt; t.stop());
-    router.back();
-  };
-
-  if (hasPermission === null) {
-    return (
-      &lt;View style={[styles.container, { justifyContent: "center", alignItems: "center" }]}&gt;
-        &lt;ActivityIndicator size="large" color="#3B82F6" /&gt;
-        &lt;Text style={{ color: "#888", marginTop: 12 }}&gt;Requesting camera access…&lt;/Text&gt;
-      &lt;/View&gt;
-    );
-  }
-
-  if (hasPermission === false) {
-    return (
-      &lt;View style={[styles.container, { justifyContent: "center", alignItems: "center", padding: 32 }]}&gt;
-        &lt;Text style={{ fontSize: 40, marginBottom: 16 }}&gt;📷&lt;/Text&gt;
-        &lt;Text style={{ color: "#fff", fontSize: 18, fontWeight: "700", textAlign: "center", marginBottom: 8 }}&gt;
-          Camera Access Required
-        &lt;/Text&gt;
-        &lt;Text style={{ color: "#888", fontSize: 14, textAlign: "center", marginBottom: 24, lineHeight: 20 }}&gt;
-          Camera permission is needed to photograph vehicles. Please allow access in your browser settings.
-        &lt;/Text&gt;
-        &lt;Pressable
-          onPress={requestCameraAccess}
-          style={({ pressed }) =&gt; [styles.grantBtn, { opacity: pressed ? 0.85 : 1 }]}
-        &gt;
-          &lt;Text style={styles.grantBtnText}&gt;Grant Camera Access&lt;/Text&gt;
-        &lt;/Pressable&gt;
-        &lt;Pressable onPress={handleClose} style={{ marginTop: 16 }}&gt;
-          &lt;Text style={{ color: "#555", fontSize: 14 }}&gt;Cancel&lt;/Text&gt;
-        &lt;/Pressable&gt;
-      &lt;/View&gt;
-    );
-  }
-
-  return (
-    &lt;View style={styles.container}&gt;
-      {/* Camera feed */}
-      &lt;div style={{ position: "absolute", inset: 0 }}&gt;
-        &lt;video
-          ref={videoRef}
-          autoPlay
-          playsInline
-          style={{ width: "100%", height: "100%", objectFit: "cover" }}
-        /&gt;
-        &lt;canvas ref={canvasRef} style={{ display: "none" }} /&gt;
-      &lt;/div&gt;
-
-      {/* Capture flash overlay */}
-      {captureFlash &amp;&amp; (
-        &lt;View style={styles.flashOverlay} /&gt;
-      )}
-
-      {/* Dark gradient top */}
-      &lt;View style={styles.topGradient} /&gt;
-
-      {/* ── Top bar ── */}
-      &lt;View style={styles.topBar}&gt;
-        &lt;Pressable
-          onPress={handleClose}
-          style={({ pressed }) =&gt; [styles.iconBtn, { opacity: pressed ? 0.7 : 1 }]}
-        &gt;
-          &lt;Text style={{ color: "#fff", fontSize: 18, fontWeight: "700" }}&gt;✕&lt;/Text&gt;
-        &lt;/Pressable&gt;
-
-        &lt;View style={styles.titlePill}&gt;
-          &lt;Text style={styles.titleText}&gt;Capture Vehicle&lt;/Text&gt;
-        &lt;/View&gt;
-
-        {/* GPS status */}
-        &lt;View style={[styles.gpsPill, { backgroundColor: gpsReady ? "rgba(34,197,94,0.85)" : "rgba(239,68,68,0.85)" }]}&gt;
-          &lt;View style={[styles.gpsDot, { backgroundColor: gpsReady ? "#fff" : "#fca5a5" }]} /&gt;
-          &lt;Text style={styles.gpsText}&gt;{gpsReady ? "GPS" : "No GPS"}&lt;/Text&gt;
-        &lt;/View&gt;
-      &lt;/View&gt;
-
-      {/* ── License plate targeting overlay ── */}
-      &lt;View style={styles.overlayContainer}&gt;
-        {/* Dimmed areas */}
-        &lt;View style={styles.dimTop} /&gt;
-        &lt;View style={styles.dimRow}&gt;
-          &lt;View style={styles.dimSide} /&gt;
-          {/* Target frame */}
-          &lt;View style={styles.targetFrame}&gt;
-            {/* Corner brackets */}
-            &lt;View style={[styles.corner, styles.cornerTL]} /&gt;
-            &lt;View style={[styles.corner, styles.cornerTR]} /&gt;
-            &lt;View style={[styles.corner, styles.cornerBL]} /&gt;
-            &lt;View style={[styles.corner, styles.cornerBR]} /&gt;
-            {/* Center scan line */}
-            &lt;View style={styles.scanLine} /&gt;
-          &lt;/View&gt;
-          &lt;View style={styles.dimSide} /&gt;
-        &lt;/View&gt;
-        &lt;View style={styles.dimBottom} /&gt;
-      &lt;/View&gt;
-
-      {/* ── Targeting label ── */}
-      &lt;View style={styles.targetLabel}&gt;
-        &lt;Text style={styles.targetLabelText}&gt;Align license plate within frame&lt;/Text&gt;
-      &lt;/View&gt;
-
-      {/* GPS coordinates display */}
-      {gpsCoords &amp;&amp; (
-        &lt;View style={styles.coordsDisplay}&gt;
-          &lt;Text style={styles.coordsText}&gt;
-            {gpsCoords.lat.toFixed(5)}, {gpsCoords.lon.toFixed(5)}

-        &lt;/View&gt;
-      )}
-
-      {/* Dark gradient bottom */}
-      &lt;View style={styles.bottomGradient} /&gt;
-
-      {/* ── Bottom capture controls ── */}
-      &lt;View style={styles.bottomBar}&gt;
-        &lt;View style={{ width: 56 }} /&gt;
-
-        {/* Capture button */}
-        &lt;Pressable
-          onPress={handleCapture}
-          disabled={isCapturing}
-          style={({ pressed }) =&gt; [
-            styles.captureBtn,
-            { transform: [{ scale: pressed ? 0.93 : 1 }], opacity: isCapturing ? 0.7 : 1 },

-          &lt;/View&gt;
-        &lt;/Pressable&gt;
-
-        {/* Upload from gallery */}

-          }}
-          style={({ pressed }) =&gt; [styles.galleryBtn, { opacity: pressed ? 0.7 : 1 }]}
-        &gt;
-          &lt;Text style={{ fontSize: 22 }}&gt;🖼&lt;/Text&gt;
-        &lt;/Pressable&gt;
-      &lt;/View&gt;
-
-      &lt;Text style={styles.captureHint}&gt;
-        {isCapturing ? "Capturing &amp; locating…" : "Tap to capture"}
-      &lt;/Text&gt;
-    &lt;/View&gt;
-  );
-}
-
-const styles = StyleSheet.create({

diff --git a/app/dev/theme-lab.tsx b/app/dev/theme-lab.tsx

@@ -1,241 +0,0 @@
-import { useMemo, useState } from "react";
-import { Pressable, ScrollView, StyleSheet, Text, TouchableOpacity, View } from "react-native";
-
-import { ScreenContainer } from "@/components/screen-container";
-import { ThemedView } from "@/components/themed-view";
-import { IconSymbol } from "@/components/ui/icon-symbol";
-import { SchemeColors, type ColorScheme } from "@/constants/theme";
-import { useColors } from "@/hooks/use-colors";
-import { useThemeContext } from "@/lib/theme-provider";
-
-type PaletteName = keyof typeof SchemeColors.light;
-
-const paletteNames: PaletteName[] = Object.keys(SchemeColors.light) as PaletteName[];
-
-function ColorSwatch({ name, value }: { name: PaletteName; value: string }) {
-  return (
-    &lt;View className="flex-row items-center justify-between rounded-xl border border-border px-3 py-2"&gt;
-      &lt;View className="flex-row items-center gap-3"&gt;
-        &lt;View className="h-6 w-6 rounded-full border border-border" style={{ backgroundColor: value }} /&gt;
-        &lt;Text className="text-sm font-semibold text-foreground"&gt;{name}&lt;/Text&gt;
-      &lt;/View&gt;
-      &lt;Text className="text-xs font-mono text-muted"&gt;{value}&lt;/Text&gt;
-    &lt;/View&gt;
-  );
-}
-
-export default function ThemeLabScreen() {
-  const [pressCount, setPressCount] = useState(0);
-  const [lastAction, setLastAction] = useState&lt;string&gt;("None yet");
-  const { colorScheme, setColorScheme } = useThemeContext();
-  const colors = useColors();
-
-  const swatches = useMemo(
-    () =&gt;
-      paletteNames.map((name) =&gt; ({
-        name,
-        value: SchemeColors[colorScheme][name],
-      })),
-    [colorScheme],
-  );
-
-  const tileStyles = useMemo(() =&gt; {
-    const build = (scheme: ColorScheme) =&gt; ({
-      background: SchemeColors[scheme].background,
-      border: SchemeColors[scheme].border,
-      text: SchemeColors[scheme].foreground,
-      subText: SchemeColors[scheme].muted,
-      activeBackground: SchemeColors[scheme].primary,
-      activeText: SchemeColors[scheme].background,
-    });
-    return {
-      light: build("light"),
-      dark: build("dark"),
-    };
-  }, []);
-
-  return (
-    &lt;ScreenContainer className="p-5"&gt;
-      &lt;ScrollView className="flex-1"&gt;
-        &lt;View className="gap-4 pb-8"&gt;
-          &lt;View className="flex-row gap-2"&gt;
-            {(["light", "dark"] as ColorScheme[]).map((scheme) =&gt; (
-              &lt;Pressable
-                key={scheme}
-                style={[
-                  styles.schemeToggle,
-                  {
-                    backgroundColor:
-                      colorScheme === scheme
-                        ? tileStyles[scheme].activeBackground
-                        : tileStyles[scheme].background,
-                    borderColor:
-                      colorScheme === scheme
-                        ? tileStyles[scheme].activeBackground
-                        : tileStyles[scheme].border,
-                  },
-                ]}
-                onPress={() =&gt; {
-                  setColorScheme(scheme);
-                  setLastAction(&#96;Applied ${scheme} globally&#96;);
-                }}
-              &gt;
-                &lt;Text
-                  style={[
-                    styles.schemeToggleTitle,
-                    {
-                      color:
-                        colorScheme === scheme
-                          ? tileStyles[scheme].activeText
-                          : tileStyles[scheme].text,
-                    },
-                  ]}
-                &gt;
-                  {scheme === "light" ? "Light preview" : "Dark preview"}
-                &lt;/Text&gt;
-                &lt;Text
-                  style={[
-                    styles.schemeToggleSubtitle,
-                    {
-                      color:
-                        colorScheme === scheme
-                          ? tileStyles[scheme].activeText
-                          : tileStyles[scheme].subText,
-                    },
-                  ]}
-                &gt;
-                  Global theme (NativeWind + useColors)
-                &lt;/Text&gt;
-              &lt;/Pressable&gt;
-            ))}
-          &lt;/View&gt;
-
-          &lt;ThemedView className="rounded-2xl border border-border p-4"&gt;
-            &lt;Text className="text-lg font-bold text-foreground"&gt;
-              Tailwind tokens
-            &lt;/Text&gt;
-            &lt;Text className="mt-1 text-sm text-muted"&gt;
-              Buttons and badges driven by global {colorScheme} palette
-            &lt;/Text&gt;
-
-            &lt;View className="mt-4 flex-row flex-wrap gap-2"&gt;
-              &lt;TouchableOpacity
-                className="rounded-full px-4 py-2"
-                style={{ backgroundColor: SchemeColors[colorScheme].primary }}
-                onPress={() =&gt; {
-                  setPressCount((count) =&gt; count + 1);
-                  setLastAction("Pressed Primary token");
-                }}
-              &gt;
-                &lt;Text className="text-sm font-semibold text-background"&gt;Primary&lt;/Text&gt;
-              &lt;/TouchableOpacity&gt;
-              &lt;TouchableOpacity
-                className="rounded-full px-4 py-2 border border-border"
-                style={{ backgroundColor: SchemeColors[colorScheme].surface }}
-                onPress={() =&gt; {
-                  setPressCount((count) =&gt; count + 1);
-                  setLastAction("Pressed Surface token");
-                }}
-              &gt;
-                &lt;Text className="text-sm font-semibold text-foreground"&gt;
-                  Surface
-                &lt;/Text&gt;
-              &lt;/TouchableOpacity&gt;
-              &lt;TouchableOpacity
-                className="rounded-full px-4 py-2"
-                style={{ backgroundColor: SchemeColors[colorScheme].success }}
-                onPress={() =&gt; {
-                  setPressCount((count) =&gt; count + 1);
-                  setLastAction("Pressed Success token");
-                }}
-              &gt;
-                &lt;Text className="text-sm font-semibold text-background"&gt;
-                  Success
-                &lt;/Text&gt;
-              &lt;/TouchableOpacity&gt;
-              &lt;TouchableOpacity
-                className="rounded-full px-4 py-2"
-                style={{ backgroundColor: SchemeColors[colorScheme].warning }}
-                onPress={() =&gt; {
-                  setPressCount((count) =&gt; count + 1);
-                  setLastAction("Pressed Warning token");
-                }}
-              &gt;
-                &lt;Text className="text-sm font-semibold text-background"&gt;
-                  Warning
-                &lt;/Text&gt;
-              &lt;/TouchableOpacity&gt;
-              &lt;TouchableOpacity
-                className="rounded-full px-4 py-2"
-                style={{ backgroundColor: SchemeColors[colorScheme].error }}
-                onPress={() =&gt; {
-                  setPressCount((count) =&gt; count + 1);
-                  setLastAction("Pressed Error token");
-                }}
-              &gt;
-                &lt;Text className="text-sm font-semibold text-background"&gt;
-                  Error
-                &lt;/Text&gt;
-              &lt;/TouchableOpacity&gt;
-            &lt;/View&gt;
-
-            &lt;View className="mt-4 rounded-xl bg-background p-4 border border-border"&gt;
-              &lt;Text className="text-base font-semibold text-foreground"&gt;
-                useColors()
-              &lt;/Text&gt;
-              &lt;Text className="mt-1 text-sm text-muted"&gt;
-                Background: {colors.background} • Text: {colors.text} • Tint: {colors.tint}
-              &lt;/Text&gt;
-              &lt;Text className="text-xs text-muted"&gt;
-                (Pressable uses style; Tailwind on Pressable is disabled via remap)
-              &lt;/Text&gt;
-              &lt;View className="mt-3 gap-2"&gt;
-                &lt;View className="flex-row items-center gap-2"&gt;
-                  &lt;IconSymbol name="house.fill" color={colors.tint} size={20} /&gt;
-                  &lt;Text className="text-sm text-foreground"&gt;
-                    Press count: {pressCount}
-                  &lt;/Text&gt;
-                &lt;/View&gt;
-                &lt;Text className="text-sm text-muted"&gt;
-                  Last action: {lastAction}
-                &lt;/Text&gt;
-              &lt;/View&gt;
-            &lt;/View&gt;
-          &lt;/ThemedView&gt;
-
-          &lt;ThemedView className="rounded-2xl border border-border p-4"&gt;
-            &lt;Text className="text-lg font-bold text-foreground"&gt;
-              Palette values
-            &lt;/Text&gt;
-            &lt;Text className="mt-1 text-sm text-muted"&gt;
-              Live values for the selected scheme
-            &lt;/Text&gt;
-            &lt;View className="mt-3 gap-2"&gt;
-              {swatches.map((item) =&gt; (
-                &lt;ColorSwatch key={item.name} name={item.name} value={item.value} /&gt;
-              ))}
-            &lt;/View&gt;
-          &lt;/ThemedView&gt;
-        &lt;/View&gt;
-      &lt;/ScrollView&gt;
-    &lt;/ScreenContainer&gt;
-  );
-}
-
-const styles = StyleSheet.create({
-  schemeToggle: {
-    flex: 1,
-    borderWidth: 1,
-    borderRadius: 16,
-    paddingHorizontal: 16,
-    paddingVertical: 12,
-    gap: 4,
-  },
-  schemeToggleTitle: {
-    fontSize: 16,
-    fontWeight: "600",
-  },
-  schemeToggleSubtitle: {
-    fontSize: 12,
-  },
-});
diff --git a/app/oauth/callback.tsx b/app/oauth/callback.tsx
deleted file mode 100644
index d559840..0000000
--- a/app/oauth/callback.tsx
+++ /dev/null
@@ -1,271 +0,0 @@
-import { ThemedView } from "@/components/themed-view";
-import * as Api from "@/lib/_core/api";
-import * as Auth from "@/lib/_core/auth";
-import * as Linking from "expo-linking";
-import { useLocalSearchParams, useRouter } from "expo-router";
-import { useEffect, useState } from "react";
-import { ActivityIndicator, Text } from "react-native";
-import { SafeAreaView } from "react-native-safe-area-context";
-
-export default function OAuthCallback() {
-  const router = useRouter();
-  const params = useLocalSearchParams&lt;{
-    code?: string;
-    state?: string;
-    error?: string;
-    sessionToken?: string;
-    user?: string;
-  }&gt;();
-  const [status, setStatus] = useState&lt;"processing" | "success" | "error"&gt;("processing");
-  const [errorMessage, setErrorMessage] = useState&lt;string | null&gt;(null);
-
-  useEffect(() =&gt; {
-    const handleCallback = async () =&gt; {
-      console.log("[OAuth] Callback handler triggered");
-      console.log("[OAuth] Params received:", {
-        code: params.code,
-        state: params.state,
-        error: params.error,
-        sessionToken: params.sessionToken ? "present" : "missing",
-        user: params.user ? "present" : "missing",
-      });
-      try {
-        // Check for sessionToken in params first (web OAuth callback from server redirect)
-        if (params.sessionToken) {
-          console.log("[OAuth] Session token found in params (web callback)");
-          await Auth.setSessionToken(params.sessionToken);
-
-          // Decode and store user info if available
-          if (params.user) {
-            try {
-              // Use atob for base64 decoding (works in both web and React Native)
-              const userJson =
-                typeof atob !== "undefined"
-                  ? atob(params.user)
-                  : Buffer.from(params.user, "base64").toString("utf-8");
-              const userData = JSON.parse(userJson);
-              const userInfo: Auth.User = {
-                id: userData.id,
-                openId: userData.openId,
-                name: userData.name,
-                email: userData.email,
-                loginMethod: userData.loginMethod,
-                lastSignedIn: new Date(userData.lastSignedIn || Date.now()),
-              };
-              await Auth.setUserInfo(userInfo);
-              console.log("[OAuth] User info stored:", userInfo);
-            } catch (err) {
-              console.error("[OAuth] Failed to parse user data:", err);
-            }
-          }
-
-          setStatus("success");
-          console.log("[OAuth] Web authentication successful, redirecting to home...");
-          setTimeout(() =&gt; {
-            router.replace("/(tabs)");
-          }, 1000);
-          return;
-        }
-
-        // Get URL from params or Linking
-        let url: string | null = null;
-
-        // Try to get from local search params first (works with expo-router)
-        if (params.code || params.state || params.error) {
-          console.log("[OAuth] Found params in route params");
-          // Extract from params
-          const urlParams = new URLSearchParams();
-          if (params.code) urlParams.set("code", params.code);
-          if (params.state) urlParams.set("state", params.state);
-          if (params.error) urlParams.set("error", params.error);
-          url = &#96;?${urlParams.toString()}&#96;;
-          console.log("[OAuth] Constructed URL from params:", url);
-        } else {
-          console.log("[OAuth] No params found, checking Linking.getInitialURL()...");
-          // Fallback: try to get from Linking
-          const initialUrl = await Linking.getInitialURL();
-          console.log("[OAuth] Linking.getInitialURL():", initialUrl);
-          if (initialUrl) {
-            url = initialUrl;
-          }
-        }
-
-        // Check for error
-        const error =
-          params.error || (url ? new URL(url, "http://dummy").searchParams.get("error") : null);
-        if (error) {
-          console.error("[OAuth] Error parameter found:", error);
-          setStatus("error");
-          setErrorMessage(error || "OAuth error occurred");
-          return;
-        }
-
-        // Check for code and state
-        let code: string | null = null;
-        let state: string | null = null;
-        let sessionToken: string | null = null;
-
-        // Try to get from params first
-        if (params.code &amp;&amp; params.state) {
-          console.log("[OAuth] Using code and state from route params");
-          code = params.code;
-          state = params.state;
-        } else if (url) {
-          console.log("[OAuth] Parsing code and state from URL:", url);
-          // Parse from URL
-          try {
-            const urlObj = new URL(url);
-            code = urlObj.searchParams.get("code");
-            state = urlObj.searchParams.get("state");
-            sessionToken = urlObj.searchParams.get("sessionToken");
-            console.log("[OAuth] Extracted from URL:", {
-              code: code?.substring(0, 20) + "...",
-              state: state?.substring(0, 20) + "...",
-              sessionToken: sessionToken ? "present" : "missing",
-            });
-          } catch (e) {
-            console.log("[OAuth] Failed to parse as full URL, trying regex:", e);
-            // Try parsing as relative URL with query params
-            const match = url.match(/[?&amp;](code|state|sessionToken)=([^&amp;]+)/g);
-            if (match) {
-              match.forEach((param) =&gt; {
-                const [key, value] = param.substring(1).split("=");
-                if (key === "code") code = decodeURIComponent(value);
-                if (key === "state") state = decodeURIComponent(value);
-                if (key === "sessionToken") sessionToken = decodeURIComponent(value);
-              });
-              console.log("[OAuth] Extracted from regex:", {
-                code: code?.substring(0, 20) + "...",
-                state: state?.substring(0, 20) + "...",
-                sessionToken: sessionToken ? "present" : "missing",
-              });
-            }
-          }
-        }
-
-        console.log("[OAuth] Final extracted values:", {
-          hasCode: !!code,
-          hasState: !!state,
-          hasSessionToken: !!sessionToken,
-        });
-
-        // If we have sessionToken directly from URL, use it
-        if (sessionToken) {
-          console.log("[OAuth] Session token found in URL, storing...");
-          await Auth.setSessionToken(sessionToken);
-          console.log("[OAuth] Session token stored successfully");
-          // User info is already in the OAuth callback response
-          // No need to fetch from API
-          setStatus("success");
-          console.log("[OAuth] Redirecting to home...");
-          setTimeout(() =&gt; {
-            router.replace("/(tabs)");
-          }, 1000);
-          return;
-        }
-
-        // Otherwise, exchange code for session token
-        if (!code || !state) {
-          console.error("[OAuth] Missing code or state parameter", {
-            hasCode: !!code,
-            hasState: !!state,
-          });
-          setStatus("error");
-          setErrorMessage("Missing code or state parameter");
-          return;
-        }
-
-        // Exchange code for session token
-        console.log("[OAuth] Exchanging code for session token...", {
-          code: code.substring(0, 20) + "...",
-          state: state.substring(0, 20) + "...",
-        });
-        const result = await Api.exchangeOAuthCode(code, state);
-        console.log("[OAuth] Exchange result:", {
-          hasSessionToken: !!result.sessionToken,
-          hasUser: !!result.user,
-        });
-
-        if (result.sessionToken) {
-          console.log("[OAuth] Session token received, storing...");
-          // Store session token
-          await Auth.setSessionToken(result.sessionToken);
-          console.log("[OAuth] Session token stored successfully");
-
-          // Store user info if available
-          if (result.user) {
-            console.log("[OAuth] User data received:", result.user);
-            const userInfo: Auth.User = {
-              id: result.user.id,
-              openId: result.user.openId,
-              name: result.user.name,
-              email: result.user.email,
-              loginMethod: result.user.loginMethod,
-              lastSignedIn: new Date(result.user.lastSignedIn || Date.now()),
-            };
-            await Auth.setUserInfo(userInfo);
-            console.log("[OAuth] User info stored:", userInfo);
-          } else {
-            console.log("[OAuth] No user data in result");
-          }
-
-          setStatus("success");
-          console.log("[OAuth] Authentication successful, redirecting to home...");
-
-          // Redirect to home after a short delay
-          setTimeout(() =&gt; {
-            console.log("[OAuth] Executing redirect...");
-            router.replace("/(tabs)");
-          }, 1000);
-        } else {
-          console.error("[OAuth] No session token in result:", result);
-          setStatus("error");
-          setErrorMessage("No session token received");
-        }
-      } catch (error) {
-        console.error("[OAuth] Callback error:", error);
-        setStatus("error");
-        setErrorMessage(
-          error instanceof Error ? error.message : "Failed to complete authentication",
-        );
-      }
-    };
-
-    handleCallback();
-  }, [params.code, params.state, params.error, params.sessionToken, params.user, router]);
-
-  return (
-    &lt;SafeAreaView className="flex-1" edges={["top", "bottom", "left", "right"]}&gt;
-      &lt;ThemedView className="flex-1 items-center justify-center gap-4 p-5"&gt;
-        {status === "processing" &amp;&amp; (
-          &lt;&gt;
-            &lt;ActivityIndicator size="large" /&gt;
-            &lt;Text className="mt-4 text-base leading-6 text-center text-foreground"&gt;
-              Completing authentication...
-            &lt;/Text&gt;
-          &lt;/&gt;
-        )}
-        {status === "success" &amp;&amp; (
-          &lt;&gt;
-            &lt;Text className="text-base leading-6 text-center text-foreground"&gt;
-              Authentication successful!
-            &lt;/Text&gt;
-            &lt;Text className="text-base leading-6 text-center text-foreground"&gt;
-              Redirecting...
-            &lt;/Text&gt;
-          &lt;/&gt;
-        )}
-        {status === "error" &amp;&amp; (
-          &lt;&gt;
-            &lt;Text className="mb-2 text-xl font-bold leading-7 text-error"&gt;
-              Authentication failed
-            &lt;/Text&gt;
-            &lt;Text className="text-base leading-6 text-center text-foreground"&gt;
-              {errorMessage}
-            &lt;/Text&gt;
-          &lt;/&gt;
-        )}
-      &lt;/ThemedView&gt;
-    &lt;/SafeAreaView&gt;
-  );
-}
diff --git a/app/plate/[licensePlate].tsx b/app/plate/[licensePlate].tsx
deleted file mode 100644
index f9223df..0000000
--- a/app/plate/[licensePlate].tsx
+++ /dev/null
@@ -1,542 +0,0 @@
-import { useState, useMemo, useEffect } from "react";
-import {
-  View, Text, ScrollView, Image, Pressable,
-  ActivityIndicator, StyleSheet, Share,
-} from "react-native";
-import { router, useLocalSearchParams } from "expo-router";
-import { ScreenContainer } from "@/components/screen-container";
-import { useColors } from "@/hooks/use-colors";
-import { trpc } from "@/lib/trpc";
-import { LeafletMap } from "@/components/leaflet-map";
-import {
-  isWatching, watchPlate, unwatchPlate,
-  requestNotificationPermission, sendNotification,
-  hasSeen, markSeen,
-} from "@/lib/notifications";
-
-const AGENCY_COLORS: Record&lt;string, string&gt; = {
-  ICE: "#EF4444", CBP: "#F59E0B", DHS: "#8B5CF6",
-  FBI: "#3B82F6", DEA: "#10B981", ATF: "#F97316",
-  USMS: "#EC4899", Other: "#6B7280",
-};
-
-type Sighting = {
-  id: number;
-  latitude: string;
-  longitude: string;
-  licensePlate: string;
-  vehicleType: string | null;
-  credibilityScore: string;
-  upvotes: number;
-  downvotes: number;
-  photoUrl: string;
-  createdAt: Date;
-  locationAddress: string | null;
-  agencyType?: string | null;
-  vehicleMake?: string | null;
-  vehicleModel?: string | null;
-  vehicleColor?: string | null;
-  badgeNumber?: string | null;
-};
-
-function getCredColor(score: number): string {
-  if (score &gt;= 70) return "#22C55E";
-  if (score &gt;= 40) return "#F59E0B";
-  return "#EF4444";
-}
-
-function timeAgo(date: Date): string {
-  const diff = Date.now() - new Date(date).getTime();
-  const mins = Math.floor(diff / 60000);
-  if (mins &lt; 1) return "just now";
-  if (mins &lt; 60) return &#96;${mins}m ago&#96;;
-  const hrs = Math.floor(mins / 60);
-  if (hrs &lt; 24) return &#96;${hrs}h ago&#96;;
-  return &#96;${Math.floor(hrs / 24)}d ago&#96;;
-}
-
-function calcBearing(lat1: number, lon1: number, lat2: number, lon2: number): number {
-  const toRad = (d: number) =&gt; (d * Math.PI) / 180;
-  const dLon = toRad(lon2 - lon1);
-  const y = Math.sin(dLon) * Math.cos(toRad(lat2));
-  const x =
-    Math.cos(toRad(lat1)) * Math.sin(toRad(lat2)) -
-    Math.sin(toRad(lat1)) * Math.cos(toRad(lat2)) * Math.cos(dLon);
-  return ((Math.atan2(y, x) * 180) / Math.PI + 360) % 360;
-}
-
-function bearingToArrow(bearing: number): string {
-  const dirs = ["↑", "↗", "→", "↘", "↓", "↙", "←", "↖"];
-  return dirs[Math.round(bearing / 45) % 8];
-}
-
-function calcDistanceKm(lat1: number, lon1: number, lat2: number, lon2: number): number {
-  const R = 6371;
-  const dLat = ((lat2 - lat1) * Math.PI) / 180;
-  const dLon = ((lon2 - lon1) * Math.PI) / 180;
-  const a =
-    Math.sin(dLat / 2) ** 2 +
-    Math.cos((lat1 * Math.PI) / 180) *
-    Math.cos((lat2 * Math.PI) / 180) *
-    Math.sin(dLon / 2) ** 2;
-  return R * 2 * Math.atan2(Math.sqrt(a), Math.sqrt(1 - a));
-}
-
-export default function PlateTrackingScreen() {
-  const colors = useColors();
-  const params = useLocalSearchParams();
-  const licensePlate = (params.licensePlate as string) || "";
-  const [showMap, setShowMap] = useState(true);
-  const [watching, setWatching] = useState(false);
-
-  useEffect(() =&gt; {
-    setWatching(isWatching(licensePlate));
-  }, [licensePlate]);
-
-  const handleToggleWatch = async () =&gt; {
-    if (watching) {
-      unwatchPlate(licensePlate);
-      setWatching(false);
-    } else {
-      const granted = await requestNotificationPermission();
-      watchPlate(licensePlate);
-      setWatching(true);
-      if (granted) {
-        sendNotification(
-          &#96;Watching ${licensePlate}&#96;,
-          "You'll be notified when this vehicle is spotted.",
-          &#96;watch-${licensePlate}&#96;
-        );
-      }
-    }
-  };
-
-  const { data: sightings, isLoading, refetch } = trpc.plates.getByPlate.useQuery({ licensePlate });
-
-  const typedSightings: Sighting[] = (sightings as Sighting[]) || [];
-
-  // Sort oldest → newest for timeline
-  const sorted = useMemo(() =&gt;
-    [...typedSightings].sort((a, b) =&gt; new Date(a.createdAt).getTime() - new Date(b.createdAt).getTime()),
-    [typedSightings]
-  );
-
-  const markers = sorted.map((s) =&gt; ({
-    id: s.id,
-    latitude: parseFloat(s.latitude),
-    longitude: parseFloat(s.longitude),
-    licensePlate: s.licensePlate,
-    vehicleType: s.vehicleType,
-    credibilityScore: s.credibilityScore,
-    upvotes: s.upvotes,
-    downvotes: s.downvotes,
-    agencyType: s.agencyType,
-  }));
-
-  const centerLat = markers.length
-    ? markers.reduce((s, m) =&gt; s + m.latitude, 0) / markers.length
-    : 37.7749;
-  const centerLng = markers.length
-    ? markers.reduce((s, m) =&gt; s + m.longitude, 0) / markers.length
-    : -122.4194;
-
-  // Total distance traveled
-  const totalDistKm = useMemo(() =&gt; {
-    let d = 0;
-    for (let i = 1; i &lt; sorted.length; i++) {
-      d += calcDistanceKm(
-        parseFloat(sorted[i - 1].latitude), parseFloat(sorted[i - 1].longitude),
-        parseFloat(sorted[i].latitude), parseFloat(sorted[i].longitude)
-      );
-    }
-    return d;
-  }, [sorted]);
-
-  // Dominant agency
-  const dominantAgency = useMemo(() =&gt; {
-    const counts: Record&lt;string, number&gt; = {};
-    sorted.forEach((s) =&gt; { if (s.agencyType) counts[s.agencyType] = (counts[s.agencyType] || 0) + 1; });
-    return Object.entries(counts).sort((a, b) =&gt; b[1] - a[1])[0]?.[0] || null;
-  }, [sorted]);
-
-  const handleShare = async () =&gt; {
-    const url = typeof window !== "undefined" ? &#96;${window.location.origin}/plate/${licensePlate}&#96; : "";
-    const text = &#96;ICE Tracker: Plate ${licensePlate} — ${sorted.length} sighting(s) tracked&#96;;
-    try {
-      if (typeof navigator !== "undefined" &amp;&amp; navigator.share) {
-        await navigator.share({ title: &#96;ICE Tracker: ${licensePlate}&#96;, text, url });
-      } else if (typeof navigator !== "undefined" &amp;&amp; navigator.clipboard) {
-        await navigator.clipboard.writeText(url);
-        alert("Link copied to clipboard!");
-      } else {
-        alert(url);
-      }
-    } catch {}
-  };
-
-  const handleExportCSV = () =&gt; {
-    const header = "id,licensePlate,latitude,longitude,locationAddress,vehicleType,agencyType,vehicleMake,vehicleModel,credibilityScore,upvotes,downvotes,createdAt";
-    const rows = sorted.map((s) =&gt;
-      [
-        s.id, s.licensePlate, s.latitude, s.longitude,
-        &#96;"${(s.locationAddress || "").replace(/"/g, "'")}"&#96;,
-        s.vehicleType || "", s.agencyType || "",
-        s.vehicleMake || "", s.vehicleModel || "",
-        s.credibilityScore, s.upvotes, s.downvotes,
-        new Date(s.createdAt).toISOString(),
-      ].join(",")
-    );
-    const csv = [header, ...rows].join("\n");
-    if (typeof window !== "undefined") {
-      const blob = new Blob([csv], { type: "text/csv" });
-      const a = document.createElement("a");
-      a.href = URL.createObjectURL(blob);
-      a.download = &#96;plate-${licensePlate}-history.csv&#96;;
-      a.click();
-    }
-  };
-
-  const handleExportJSON = () =&gt; {
-    const json = JSON.stringify(sorted, null, 2);
-    if (typeof window !== "undefined") {
-      const blob = new Blob([json], { type: "application/json" });
-      const a = document.createElement("a");
-      a.href = URL.createObjectURL(blob);
-      a.download = &#96;plate-${licensePlate}-history.json&#96;;
-      a.click();
-    }
-  };
-
-  if (isLoading) {
-    return (
-      &lt;ScreenContainer containerClassName="bg-[#0d0d1a]"&gt;
-        &lt;View style={{ flex: 1, alignItems: "center", justifyContent: "center" }}&gt;
-          &lt;ActivityIndicator size="large" color="#3B82F6" /&gt;
-        &lt;/View&gt;
-      &lt;/ScreenContainer&gt;
-    );
-  }
-
-  return (
-    &lt;ScreenContainer containerClassName="bg-[#0d0d1a]"&gt;
-      &lt;ScrollView style={{ flex: 1 }} contentContainerStyle={{ paddingBottom: 40 }}&gt;
-
-        {/* ── Header ── */}
-        &lt;View style={styles.header}&gt;
-          &lt;Pressable onPress={() =&gt; router.back()} style={({ pressed }) =&gt; ({ opacity: pressed ? 0.6 : 1 })}&gt;
-            &lt;Text style={styles.backBtn}&gt;← Back&lt;/Text&gt;
-          &lt;/Pressable&gt;
-          &lt;View style={{ flexDirection: "row", gap: 8, alignItems: "center", flexWrap: "wrap" }}&gt;
-            &lt;Pressable
-              onPress={handleToggleWatch}
-              style={({ pressed }) =&gt; [styles.watchBtn, watching &amp;&amp; styles.watchBtnActive, { opacity: pressed ? 0.8 : 1 }]}
-            &gt;
-              &lt;Text style={[styles.watchBtnText, watching &amp;&amp; styles.watchBtnTextActive]}&gt;
-                {watching ? "🔔 Watching" : "🔕 Watch"}
-              &lt;/Text&gt;
-            &lt;/Pressable&gt;
-            &lt;Pressable onPress={handleExportCSV} style={({ pressed }) =&gt; [styles.exportBtn, { opacity: pressed ? 0.7 : 1 }]}&gt;
-              &lt;Text style={styles.exportBtnText}&gt;CSV ↓&lt;/Text&gt;
-            &lt;/Pressable&gt;
-            &lt;Pressable onPress={handleExportJSON} style={({ pressed }) =&gt; [styles.exportBtn, { opacity: pressed ? 0.7 : 1 }]}&gt;
-              &lt;Text style={styles.exportBtnText}&gt;JSON ↓&lt;/Text&gt;
-            &lt;/Pressable&gt;
-            &lt;Pressable onPress={handleShare} style={({ pressed }) =&gt; ({ opacity: pressed ? 0.6 : 1 })}&gt;
-              &lt;Text style={styles.shareBtn}&gt;Share ↗&lt;/Text&gt;
-            &lt;/Pressable&gt;
-          &lt;/View&gt;
-        &lt;/View&gt;
-
-        {/* ── Plate hero ── */}
-        &lt;View style={styles.hero}&gt;
-          {dominantAgency &amp;&amp; (
-            &lt;View style={[styles.agencyBadge, {
-              backgroundColor: (AGENCY_COLORS[dominantAgency] || "#6B7280") + "22",
-              borderColor: (AGENCY_COLORS[dominantAgency] || "#6B7280") + "66",
-            }]}&gt;
-              &lt;Text style={[styles.agencyText, { color: AGENCY_COLORS[dominantAgency] || "#6B7280" }]}&gt;
-                {dominantAgency}
-              &lt;/Text&gt;
-            &lt;/View&gt;
-          )}
-          &lt;Text style={styles.plateHero}&gt;{licensePlate}&lt;/Text&gt;
-          {sorted[0]?.vehicleColor &amp;&amp; sorted[0]?.vehicleMake &amp;&amp; (
-            &lt;Text style={styles.vehicleSubtitle}&gt;
-              {sorted[0].vehicleColor} {sorted[0].vehicleMake} {sorted[0].vehicleModel || ""}
-            &lt;/Text&gt;
-          )}
-        &lt;/View&gt;
-
-        {/* ── Stats row ── */}
-        &lt;View style={styles.statsRow}&gt;
-          &lt;View style={styles.statCard}&gt;
-            &lt;Text style={styles.statValue}&gt;{sorted.length}&lt;/Text&gt;
-            &lt;Text style={styles.statLabel}&gt;Sightings&lt;/Text&gt;
-          &lt;/View&gt;
-          &lt;View style={styles.statCard}&gt;
-            &lt;Text style={styles.statValue}&gt;{totalDistKm.toFixed(1)} km&lt;/Text&gt;
-            &lt;Text style={styles.statLabel}&gt;Distance&lt;/Text&gt;
-          &lt;/View&gt;
-          &lt;View style={styles.statCard}&gt;
-            &lt;Text style={styles.statValue}&gt;
-              {sorted.length &gt; 0 ? timeAgo(sorted[sorted.length - 1].createdAt) : "—"}
-            &lt;/Text&gt;
-            &lt;Text style={styles.statLabel}&gt;Last seen&lt;/Text&gt;
-          &lt;/View&gt;
-        &lt;/View&gt;
-
-        {/* ── Map toggle ── */}
-        &lt;Pressable
-          onPress={() =&gt; setShowMap((v) =&gt; !v)}
-          style={({ pressed }) =&gt; [styles.mapToggle, { opacity: pressed ? 0.8 : 1 }]}
-        &gt;
-          &lt;Text style={styles.mapToggleText}&gt;{showMap ? "▲ Hide map" : "▼ Show map"}&lt;/Text&gt;
-        &lt;/Pressable&gt;
-
-        {/* ── Map ── */}
-        {showMap &amp;&amp; markers.length &gt; 0 &amp;&amp; (
-          &lt;View style={{ height: 260, marginHorizontal: 12, borderRadius: 16, overflow: "hidden", marginBottom: 16 }}&gt;
-            &lt;div style={{ position: "relative", width: "100%", height: "100%" }}&gt;
-              &lt;LeafletMap
-                markers={markers}
-                center={[centerLat, centerLng]}
-                zoom={12}
-                onMarkerClick={(m) =&gt; router.push(&#96;/sighting/${m.id}&#96; as any)}
-              /&gt;
-            &lt;/div&gt;
-          &lt;/View&gt;
-        )}
-
-        {/* ── Timeline ── */}
-        &lt;View style={styles.section}&gt;
-          &lt;Text style={styles.sectionTitle}&gt;Movement Timeline&lt;/Text&gt;
-
-          {sorted.length === 0 &amp;&amp; (
-            &lt;Text style={{ color: "#555", textAlign: "center", marginTop: 20 }}&gt;No sightings recorded yet.&lt;/Text&gt;
-          )}
-
-          {sorted.map((sighting, index) =&gt; {
-            const cred = parseFloat(sighting.credibilityScore);
-            const credColor = getCredColor(cred);
-            const isLast = index === sorted.length - 1;
-            const isFirst = index === 0;
-
-            // Direction arrow to next sighting
-            let dirArrow = "";
-            let distLabel = "";
-            if (!isLast) {
-              const next = sorted[index + 1];
-              const bearing = calcBearing(
-                parseFloat(sighting.latitude), parseFloat(sighting.longitude),
-                parseFloat(next.latitude), parseFloat(next.longitude)
-              );
-              dirArrow = bearingToArrow(bearing);
-              const dist = calcDistanceKm(
-                parseFloat(sighting.latitude), parseFloat(sighting.longitude),
-                parseFloat(next.latitude), parseFloat(next.longitude)
-              );
-              distLabel = dist &lt; 1 ? &#96;${(dist * 1000).toFixed(0)}m&#96; : &#96;${dist.toFixed(1)}km&#96;;
-            }
-
-            return (
-              &lt;View key={sighting.id}&gt;
-                &lt;Pressable
-                  onPress={() =&gt; router.push(&#96;/sighting/${sighting.id}&#96; as any)}
-                  style={({ pressed }) =&gt; [styles.timelineCard, { opacity: pressed ? 0.85 : 1 }]}
-                &gt;
-                  {/* Timeline dot &amp; line */}
-                  &lt;View style={styles.timelineDotCol}&gt;
-                    &lt;View style={[styles.timelineDot, {
-                      backgroundColor: credColor,
-                      boxShadow: &#96;0 0 8px ${credColor}88&#96;,
-                    } as any]} /&gt;
-                    {!isLast &amp;&amp; &lt;View style={styles.timelineLine} /&gt;}
-                  &lt;/View&gt;
-
-                  {/* Content */}
-                  &lt;View style={styles.timelineContent}&gt;
-                    {/* Top row: index + time */}
-                    &lt;View style={{ flexDirection: "row", justifyContent: "space-between", marginBottom: 6 }}&gt;
-                      &lt;View style={{ flexDirection: "row", alignItems: "center", gap: 6 }}&gt;
-                        &lt;Text style={styles.sightingIndex}&gt;#{index + 1}&lt;/Text&gt;
-                        {isFirst &amp;&amp; &lt;View style={styles.firstBadge}&gt;&lt;Text style={styles.firstBadgeText}&gt;FIRST&lt;/Text&gt;&lt;/View&gt;}
-                        {isLast &amp;&amp; &lt;View style={styles.latestBadge}&gt;&lt;Text style={styles.latestBadgeText}&gt;LATEST&lt;/Text&gt;&lt;/View&gt;}
-                      &lt;/View&gt;
-                      &lt;Text style={styles.timeAgoText}&gt;{timeAgo(sighting.createdAt)}&lt;/Text&gt;
-                    &lt;/View&gt;
-
-                    {/* Photo + info */}
-                    &lt;View style={{ flexDirection: "row", gap: 10 }}&gt;
-                      &lt;Image
-                        source={{ uri: sighting.photoUrl }}
-                        style={styles.thumbnail}
-                        resizeMode="cover"
-                      /&gt;
-                      &lt;View style={{ flex: 1, gap: 4 }}&gt;
-                        {sighting.locationAddress ? (
-                          &lt;Text style={styles.addressText} numberOfLines={2}&gt;{sighting.locationAddress}&lt;/Text&gt;
-                        ) : (
-                          &lt;Text style={styles.coordsText}&gt;
-                            {parseFloat(sighting.latitude).toFixed(4)}, {parseFloat(sighting.longitude).toFixed(4)}
-                          &lt;/Text&gt;
-                        )}
-                        {sighting.vehicleType &amp;&amp; (
-                          &lt;Text style={styles.vehicleTypeText}&gt;{sighting.vehicleType}&lt;/Text&gt;
-                        )}
-                        {sighting.badgeNumber &amp;&amp; (
-                          &lt;Text style={styles.badgeText}&gt;Badge: {sighting.badgeNumber}&lt;/Text&gt;
-                        )}
-                        {/* Credibility bar */}
-                        &lt;View style={{ flexDirection: "row", alignItems: "center", gap: 6, marginTop: 2 }}&gt;
-                          &lt;View style={styles.credBarBg}&gt;
-                            &lt;View style={[styles.credBarFill, { width: &#96;${cred}%&#96; as any, backgroundColor: credColor }]} /&gt;
-                          &lt;/View&gt;
-                          &lt;Text style={[styles.credPct, { color: credColor }]}&gt;{cred.toFixed(0)}%&lt;/Text&gt;
-                        &lt;/View&gt;
-                      &lt;/View&gt;
-                    &lt;/View&gt;
-
-                    &lt;Text style={styles.fullDateText}&gt;
-                      {new Date(sighting.createdAt).toLocaleString()}
-                    &lt;/Text&gt;
-                  &lt;/View&gt;
-                &lt;/Pressable&gt;
-
-                {/* Movement connector between sightings */}
-                {!isLast &amp;&amp; (
-                  &lt;View style={styles.movementConnector}&gt;
-                    &lt;Text style={styles.movementArrow}&gt;{dirArrow}&lt;/Text&gt;
-                    &lt;Text style={styles.movementDist}&gt;{distLabel}&lt;/Text&gt;
-                  &lt;/View&gt;
-                )}
-              &lt;/View&gt;
-            );
-          })}
-        &lt;/View&gt;
-      &lt;/ScrollView&gt;
-    &lt;/ScreenContainer&gt;
-  );
-}
-
-const styles = StyleSheet.create({
-  header: {
-    flexDirection: "row", justifyContent: "space-between", alignItems: "center",
-    paddingHorizontal: 16, paddingVertical: 12,
-    borderBottomWidth: 1, borderBottomColor: "rgba(255,255,255,0.07)",
-  },
-  backBtn: { color: "#3B82F6", fontSize: 15, fontWeight: "600" },
-  shareBtn: { color: "#3B82F6", fontSize: 14, fontWeight: "600" },
-
-  hero: { alignItems: "center", paddingVertical: 20, paddingHorizontal: 16 },
-  agencyBadge: {
-    borderWidth: 1, borderRadius: 8,
-    paddingHorizontal: 12, paddingVertical: 4, marginBottom: 10,
-  },
-  agencyText: { fontSize: 12, fontWeight: "800", letterSpacing: 1.5 },
-  plateHero: {
-    color: "#fff", fontSize: 36, fontWeight: "900",
-    fontFamily: "monospace", letterSpacing: 4,
-  },
-  vehicleSubtitle: { color: "#888", fontSize: 14, marginTop: 4 },
-
-  statsRow: {
-    flexDirection: "row", gap: 8, paddingHorizontal: 12, marginBottom: 12,
-  },
-  statCard: {
-    flex: 1, backgroundColor: "rgba(255,255,255,0.05)",
-    borderRadius: 12, padding: 12, alignItems: "center",
-    borderWidth: 1, borderColor: "rgba(255,255,255,0.07)",
-  },
-  statValue: { color: "#fff", fontSize: 16, fontWeight: "800" },
-  statLabel: { color: "#666", fontSize: 11, marginTop: 2 },
-
-  mapToggle: {
-    marginHorizontal: 12, marginBottom: 8,
-    backgroundColor: "rgba(255,255,255,0.05)",

-
-  section: { paddingHorizontal: 12 },
-  sectionTitle: {

-  timelineCard: {

-  },

-    borderRadius: 6,
-    backgroundColor: "rgba(59,130,246,0.15)",
-    borderWidth: 1,

-});
diff --git a/app/sighting/[id].tsx b/app/sighting/[id].tsx
deleted file mode 100644
index 4e97cf7..0000000
--- a/app/sighting/[id].tsx
+++ /dev/null
@@ -1,435 +0,0 @@
-import { useState, useEffect } from "react";
-import {
-  View, Text, ScrollView, Image, Pressable,
-  ActivityIndicator, Alert, StyleSheet, Share,
-} from "react-native";
-import { router, useLocalSearchParams } from "expo-router";
-import { ScreenContainer } from "@/components/screen-container";
-import { useColors } from "@/hooks/use-colors";
-import { trpc } from "@/lib/trpc";
-import { getDeviceId } from "@/lib/device-id";
-import { LeafletMap } from "@/components/leaflet-map";
-
-const AGENCY_COLORS: Record&lt;string, string&gt; = {
-  ICE: "#EF4444", CBP: "#F59E0B", DHS: "#8B5CF6",
-  FBI: "#3B82F6", DEA: "#10B981", ATF: "#F97316",
-  USMS: "#EC4899", Other: "#6B7280",
-};
-
-function getCredColor(score: number) {
-  if (score &gt;= 70) return "#22C55E";
-  if (score &gt;= 40) return "#F59E0B";
-  return "#EF4444";
-}
-
-function getCredLabel(score: number) {
-  if (score &gt;= 80) return "High Confidence";
-  if (score &gt;= 60) return "Likely Accurate";
-  if (score &gt;= 40) return "Unverified";
-  return "Disputed";
-}
-
-export default function SightingDetailScreen() {
-  const colors = useColors();
-  const params = useLocalSearchParams();
-  const sightingId = parseInt(params.id as string);
-
-  const [deviceId, setDeviceId] = useState&lt;string&gt;("");
-  const [userVote, setUserVote] = useState&lt;"upvote" | "downvote" | "flag" | null&gt;(null);
-
-  const { data: sighting, isLoading, refetch } = trpc.sightings.getById.useQuery({ id: sightingId });
-  const { data: existingVote } = trpc.votes.getUserVote.useQuery(
-    { deviceId, sightingId },
-    { enabled: !!deviceId }
-  );
-  const castVoteMutation = trpc.votes.cast.useMutation();
-
-  useEffect(() =&gt; {
-    (async () =&gt; { setDeviceId(await getDeviceId()); })();
-  }, []);
-
-  useEffect(() =&gt; {
-    if (existingVote) setUserVote(existingVote.voteType);
-  }, [existingVote]);
-
-  const handleVote = async (voteType: "upvote" | "downvote" | "flag") =&gt; {
-    if (!deviceId) return;
-    try {
-      if (userVote !== voteType) {
-        await castVoteMutation.mutateAsync({ deviceId, sightingId, voteType });
-        setUserVote(voteType);
-      } else {
-        setUserVote(null);
-      }
-      setTimeout(() =&gt; refetch(), 500);
-    } catch {
-      Alert.alert("Error", "Failed to submit vote. Please try again.");
-    }
-  };
-
-  const handleShare = async () =&gt; {
-    if (!sighting) return;
-    const url = typeof window !== "undefined" ? &#96;${window.location.origin}/sighting/${sightingId}&#96; : "";
-    const text = &#96;ICE Tracker: ${sighting.licensePlate} spotted — ${sighting.locationAddress || &#96;${sighting.latitude}, ${sighting.longitude}&#96;}&#96;;
-    try {
-      if (typeof navigator !== "undefined" &amp;&amp; navigator.share) {
-        await navigator.share({ title: &#96;ICE Tracker: ${sighting.licensePlate}&#96;, text, url });
-      } else if (typeof navigator !== "undefined" &amp;&amp; navigator.clipboard) {
-        await navigator.clipboard.writeText(url);
-        Alert.alert("Link Copied", "Sighting link copied to clipboard!");
-      } else {
-        Alert.alert("Share Link", url);
-      }
-    } catch {}
-  };
-
-  const handleExportCSV = async () =&gt; {
-    if (!sighting) return;
-    const rows = [
-      "id,licensePlate,latitude,longitude,locationAddress,vehicleType,agencyType,vehicleMake,vehicleModel,credibilityScore,upvotes,downvotes,createdAt",
-      [
-        sighting.id, sighting.licensePlate, sighting.latitude, sighting.longitude,
-        &#96;"${(sighting.locationAddress || "").replace(/"/g, "'")}"&#96;,
-        sighting.vehicleType || "", (sighting as any).agencyType || "",
-        (sighting as any).vehicleMake || "", (sighting as any).vehicleModel || "",
-        sighting.credibilityScore, sighting.upvotes, sighting.downvotes,
-        new Date(sighting.createdAt).toISOString(),
-      ].join(","),
-    ].join("\n");
-    if (typeof window !== "undefined") {
-      const blob = new Blob([rows], { type: "text/csv" });
-      const a = document.createElement("a");
-      a.href = URL.createObjectURL(blob);
-      a.download = &#96;sighting-${sighting.id}-${sighting.licensePlate}.csv&#96;;
-      a.click();
-    }
-  };
-
-  if (isLoading || !sighting) {
-    return (
-      &lt;ScreenContainer containerClassName="bg-[#0d0d1a]"&gt;
-        &lt;View style={{ flex: 1, alignItems: "center", justifyContent: "center" }}&gt;
-          &lt;ActivityIndicator size="large" color="#3B82F6" /&gt;
-        &lt;/View&gt;
-      &lt;/ScreenContainer&gt;
-    );
-  }
-
-  const credibility = parseFloat(sighting.credibilityScore as string);
-  const totalVotes = sighting.upvotes + sighting.downvotes;
-  const latitude = parseFloat(sighting.latitude as string);
-  const longitude = parseFloat(sighting.longitude as string);
-  const credColor = getCredColor(credibility);
-  const agencyColor = (sighting as any).agencyType
-    ? (AGENCY_COLORS[(sighting as any).agencyType] || "#6B7280")
-    : null;
-
-  // "Confirmed by multiple sources" if upvotes &gt;= 3 and credibility &gt;= 60
-  const isConfirmed = sighting.upvotes &gt;= 3 &amp;&amp; credibility &gt;= 60;
-
-  return (
-    &lt;ScreenContainer containerClassName="bg-[#0d0d1a]"&gt;
-      &lt;ScrollView style={{ flex: 1 }} contentContainerStyle={{ paddingBottom: 40 }}&gt;
-
-        {/* ── Header ── */}
-        &lt;View style={styles.header}&gt;
-          &lt;Pressable onPress={() =&gt; router.back()} style={({ pressed }) =&gt; ({ opacity: pressed ? 0.6 : 1 })}&gt;
-            &lt;Text style={styles.backBtn}&gt;← Back&lt;/Text&gt;
-          &lt;/Pressable&gt;
-          &lt;Text style={styles.headerTitle}&gt;Sighting&lt;/Text&gt;
-          &lt;Pressable onPress={handleShare} style={({ pressed }) =&gt; ({ opacity: pressed ? 0.6 : 1 })}&gt;
-            &lt;Text style={styles.shareBtn}&gt;Share ↗&lt;/Text&gt;
-          &lt;/Pressable&gt;
-        &lt;/View&gt;
-
-        {/* ── Photo ── */}
-        &lt;View style={{ position: "relative" }}&gt;
-          &lt;Image
-            source={{ uri: sighting.photoUrl }}
-            style={styles.photo}
-            resizeMode="cover"
-          /&gt;
-          {/* Agency overlay on photo */}
-          {(sighting as any).agencyType &amp;&amp; agencyColor &amp;&amp; (
-            &lt;View style={[styles.photoAgencyBadge, { backgroundColor: agencyColor + "cc" }]}&gt;
-              &lt;Text style={styles.photoAgencyText}&gt;{(sighting as any).agencyType}&lt;/Text&gt;
-            &lt;/View&gt;
-          )}
-          {isConfirmed &amp;&amp; (
-            &lt;View style={styles.confirmedBadge}&gt;
-              &lt;Text style={styles.confirmedText}&gt;✓ CONFIRMED&lt;/Text&gt;
-            &lt;/View&gt;
-          )}
-        &lt;/View&gt;
-
-        &lt;View style={styles.body}&gt;
-
-          {/* ── Plate + vehicle info ── */}
-          &lt;View style={styles.plateSection}&gt;
-            &lt;Text style={styles.plateText}&gt;{sighting.licensePlate}&lt;/Text&gt;
-            {(sighting as any).vehicleColor &amp;&amp; (sighting as any).vehicleMake &amp;&amp; (
-              &lt;Text style={styles.vehicleSubtitle}&gt;
-                {(sighting as any).vehicleColor} {(sighting as any).vehicleMake}{" "}
-                {(sighting as any).vehicleModel || ""}
-              &lt;/Text&gt;
-            )}
-            {sighting.vehicleType &amp;&amp; !(sighting as any).vehicleMake &amp;&amp; (
-              &lt;Text style={styles.vehicleSubtitle}&gt;{sighting.vehicleType}&lt;/Text&gt;
-            )}
-          &lt;/View&gt;
-
-          {/* ── Credibility panel ── */}
-          &lt;View style={[styles.credPanel, { borderColor: credColor + "44" }]}&gt;
-            &lt;View style={{ flexDirection: "row", justifyContent: "space-between", alignItems: "center", marginBottom: 10 }}&gt;
-              &lt;Text style={styles.credPanelTitle}&gt;Community Credibility&lt;/Text&gt;
-              &lt;Text style={[styles.credScore, { color: credColor }]}&gt;{credibility.toFixed(0)}%&lt;/Text&gt;
-            &lt;/View&gt;
-            {/* Credibility bar */}
-            &lt;View style={styles.credBarBg}&gt;
-              &lt;View style={[styles.credBarFill, { width: &#96;${credibility}%&#96; as any, backgroundColor: credColor }]} /&gt;
-            &lt;/View&gt;
-            &lt;Text style={[styles.credLabel, { color: credColor }]}&gt;{getCredLabel(credibility)}&lt;/Text&gt;
-            &lt;View style={styles.voteCountRow}&gt;
-              &lt;Text style={styles.voteCount}&gt;✓ {sighting.upvotes} verified&lt;/Text&gt;
-              &lt;Text style={styles.voteCount}&gt;✗ {sighting.downvotes} disputed&lt;/Text&gt;
-              &lt;Text style={styles.voteCount}&gt;🚩 {sighting.flagCount} flagged&lt;/Text&gt;
-            &lt;/View&gt;
-            {isConfirmed &amp;&amp; (
-              &lt;View style={styles.confirmedPill}&gt;
-                &lt;Text style={styles.confirmedPillText}&gt;✓ Confirmed by multiple sources&lt;/Text&gt;
-              &lt;/View&gt;
-            )}
-          &lt;/View&gt;
-
-          {/* ── Voting buttons ── */}
-          &lt;View style={styles.voteRow}&gt;
-            &lt;Pressable
-              onPress={() =&gt; handleVote("upvote")}
-              style={({ pressed }) =&gt; [
-                styles.voteBtn,
-                userVote === "upvote" &amp;&amp; { backgroundColor: "#22C55E", borderColor: "#22C55E" },
-                { opacity: pressed ? 0.8 : 1 },
-              ]}
-            &gt;
-              &lt;Text style={[styles.voteBtnText, userVote === "upvote" &amp;&amp; { color: "#fff" }]}&gt;✓ Verified&lt;/Text&gt;
-            &lt;/Pressable&gt;
-            &lt;Pressable
-              onPress={() =&gt; handleVote("downvote")}
-              style={({ pressed }) =&gt; [
-                styles.voteBtn,
-                userVote === "downvote" &amp;&amp; { backgroundColor: "#EF4444", borderColor: "#EF4444" },
-                { opacity: pressed ? 0.8 : 1 },
-              ]}
-            &gt;
-              &lt;Text style={[styles.voteBtnText, userVote === "downvote" &amp;&amp; { color: "#fff" }]}&gt;✗ Inaccurate&lt;/Text&gt;
-            &lt;/Pressable&gt;
-            &lt;Pressable
-              onPress={() =&gt; handleVote("flag")}
-              style={({ pressed }) =&gt; [
-                styles.voteBtnSmall,
-                userVote === "flag" &amp;&amp; { backgroundColor: "#F59E0B", borderColor: "#F59E0B" },
-                { opacity: pressed ? 0.8 : 1 },
-              ]}
-            &gt;
-              &lt;Text style={[styles.voteBtnText, userVote === "flag" &amp;&amp; { color: "#fff" }]}&gt;🚩&lt;/Text&gt;
-            &lt;/Pressable&gt;
-          &lt;/View&gt;
-
-          {/* ── AI Analysis panel ── */}
-          {((sighting as any).agencyType || (sighting as any).agencyMarkings || (sighting as any).badgeNumber || (sighting as any).uniformDescription) &amp;&amp; (
-            &lt;View style={styles.aiPanel}&gt;
-              &lt;Text style={styles.aiPanelTitle}&gt;AI Analysis&lt;/Text&gt;
-              {(sighting as any).agencyType &amp;&amp; agencyColor &amp;&amp; (
-                &lt;View style={styles.aiRow}&gt;
-                  &lt;Text style={styles.aiLabel}&gt;Agency&lt;/Text&gt;
-                  &lt;View style={[styles.agencyChip, { backgroundColor: agencyColor + "22", borderColor: agencyColor + "66" }]}&gt;
-                    &lt;Text style={[styles.agencyChipText, { color: agencyColor }]}&gt;{(sighting as any).agencyType}&lt;/Text&gt;
-                  &lt;/View&gt;
-                &lt;/View&gt;
-              )}
-              {(sighting as any).agencyMarkings &amp;&amp; (
-                &lt;View style={styles.aiRow}&gt;
-                  &lt;Text style={styles.aiLabel}&gt;Markings&lt;/Text&gt;
-                  &lt;Text style={styles.aiValue}&gt;{(sighting as any).agencyMarkings}&lt;/Text&gt;
-                &lt;/View&gt;
-              )}
-              {(sighting as any).badgeNumber &amp;&amp; (
-                &lt;View style={styles.aiRow}&gt;
-                  &lt;Text style={styles.aiLabel}&gt;Badge #&lt;/Text&gt;
-                  &lt;Text style={[styles.aiValue, { color: "#F59E0B", fontFamily: "monospace" }]}&gt;{(sighting as any).badgeNumber}&lt;/Text&gt;
-                &lt;/View&gt;
-              )}
-              {(sighting as any).uniformDescription &amp;&amp; (
-                &lt;View style={styles.aiRow}&gt;
-                  &lt;Text style={styles.aiLabel}&gt;Uniform&lt;/Text&gt;
-                  &lt;Text style={styles.aiValue}&gt;{(sighting as any).uniformDescription}&lt;/Text&gt;
-                &lt;/View&gt;
-              )}
-              {(sighting as any).aiConfidence &amp;&amp; (
-                &lt;View style={styles.aiRow}&gt;
-                  &lt;Text style={styles.aiLabel}&gt;AI Confidence&lt;/Text&gt;
-                  &lt;Text style={styles.aiValue}&gt;{(parseFloat((sighting as any).aiConfidence) * 100).toFixed(0)}%&lt;/Text&gt;
-                &lt;/View&gt;
-              )}
-            &lt;/View&gt;
-          )}
-
-          {/* ── Location ── */}
-          &lt;View style={styles.section}&gt;
-            &lt;Text style={styles.sectionTitle}&gt;Location&lt;/Text&gt;
-            {sighting.locationAddress &amp;&amp; (
-              &lt;Text style={styles.addressText}&gt;{sighting.locationAddress}&lt;/Text&gt;
-            )}
-            &lt;Text style={styles.coordsText}&gt;{latitude.toFixed(6)}, {longitude.toFixed(6)}&lt;/Text&gt;
-            {sighting.locationAccuracy &amp;&amp; (
-              &lt;Text style={styles.accuracyText}&gt;GPS accuracy: ±{parseFloat(sighting.locationAccuracy as string).toFixed(0)}m&lt;/Text&gt;
-            )}
-            &lt;View style={{ height: 200, borderRadius: 14, overflow: "hidden", marginTop: 10 }}&gt;
-              &lt;div style={{ position: "relative", width: "100%", height: "100%" }}&gt;
-                &lt;LeafletMap
-                  markers={[{
-                    id: sighting.id, latitude, longitude,
-                    licensePlate: sighting.licensePlate,
-                    vehicleType: sighting.vehicleType,
-                    credibilityScore: sighting.credibilityScore as string,
-                    upvotes: sighting.upvotes, downvotes: sighting.downvotes,
-                    agencyType: (sighting as any).agencyType,
-                  }]}
-                  center={[latitude, longitude]}
-                  zoom={15}
-                /&gt;
-              &lt;/div&gt;
-            &lt;/View&gt;
-          &lt;/View&gt;
-
-          {/* ── Notes ── */}
-          {sighting.notes &amp;&amp; (
-            &lt;View style={styles.section}&gt;
-              &lt;Text style={styles.sectionTitle}&gt;Notes&lt;/Text&gt;
-              &lt;View style={styles.notesBox}&gt;
-                &lt;Text style={styles.notesText}&gt;{sighting.notes}&lt;/Text&gt;
-              &lt;/View&gt;
-            &lt;/View&gt;
-          )}
-
-          {/* ── Actions ── */}
-          &lt;Pressable
-            onPress={() =&gt; router.push(&#96;/plate/${encodeURIComponent(sighting.licensePlate)}&#96; as any)}
-            style={({ pressed }) =&gt; [styles.trackBtn, { opacity: pressed ? 0.85 : 1 }]}
-          &gt;
-            &lt;Text style={styles.trackBtnText}&gt;Track This Plate →&lt;/Text&gt;
-          &lt;/Pressable&gt;
-
-          &lt;Text style={styles.timestamp}&gt;
-            Reported {new Date(sighting.createdAt).toLocaleString()}
-          &lt;/Text&gt;
-        &lt;/View&gt;
-      &lt;/ScrollView&gt;
-    &lt;/ScreenContainer&gt;
-  );
-}
-
-const styles = StyleSheet.create({
-  header: {
-    flexDirection: "row", justifyContent: "space-between", alignItems: "center",

-
-  photo: { width: "100%", height: 280, backgroundColor: "#1a1a2e" },

-

-

-
-  credPanel: {

-    borderWidth: 1,
-  },
-  credPanelTitle: { color: "#aaa", fontSize: 13, fontWeight: "600" },

-  credBarBg: { height: 6, borderRadius: 3, backgroundColor: "rgba(255,255,255,0.1)", marginBottom: 6 },

-  credLabel: { fontSize: 12, fontWeight: "700", marginBottom: 8 },

-  },
-  confirmedPillText: { color: "#22C55E", fontSize: 12, fontWeight: "700" },
-
-  voteRow: { flexDirection: "row", gap: 8 },
-  voteBtn: {

-    backgroundColor: "rgba(255,255,255,0.05)",

-    alignItems: "center",

-    alignItems: "center",
-  },
-  voteBtnText: { color: "#ccc", fontWeight: "700", fontSize: 14 },
-
-  aiPanel: {
